Works with Big Boobs and long arms! Good for cooler weather, office, church, weddings I am a 40DD, 5'3 1/2", have long arms, and am about 200lbs. I ordered the XL, and it fits me just perfectly. I'm pleasantly surprised, actually. I alsonordered it yesterday evening. And it arrived with Prime within 18hrs. It was so fast! I got this for a formal/cocktail style wedding this October, and wanted something that would be pretty warm. I also wanted a nice winter dress for the office. This ticked the bill on both of those. I will say I feel it looks better in person, as black dresses don't photograph very well. And the material is not breathable (which I like for the purpose, but I understand it's not for everyone) so it will work in a drizzle and cooler weather. I'm very pleased with this dress. I also plan to use this dress as my formal dress for my Alaskan cruise next September! Oh! It is prone to wrinkles, but the pleats in the front are not super sharp, so I'd recommend washing it and letting it hang dry in the bathroom so the steam from the shower and the gravity can do its thing. Or, if you have it, hang dry and use a wrinkle spray. Who wants to iron anyway?

This dress is so beautiful! Perfect for a winter wedding. I am a 5'2, 220lb mother of the bride. I didn't realize the pressure of getting the right dress for the wedding until 20 people asked me what I was wearing. I spent hundreds of dollars on dresses from all the fancy shops, online stores, etc. All the dresses returned until this one. The fabric was a beautiful green and so soft! Did I mention comfortable? It hugged in the right places and hide my stomach really well. I did pin the top down a bit, as I felt like I had a wall of bewb and it didn't accent the features- if you know what I mean. Overall. I give this dress 4.8 stars. It would have been perfect if it had pockets!

This one I wore for my birthday, and I felt so regal. It was breathable, yet covering. If your questioning if you should buy it, the answer is yes.

It is a beautiful dress I am a 65 year old bride, but I feel the dress could be used for any age person. It is long, and I am only 4ft 11. Everything worked out fine as far as my wedding. I just had a simple wedding beside a pond, so I did not have a big long aisle to walk down.

Classy dress I am a big girl (size 16 in shorts and pants, and I typically wear large to xl in tops to give you perspective), and I ordered this dress in XL for my college graduation. It was great! The material is like spandex in that it stretches and isn't thin. I am 5'6 and wore heels with it, and it went to my knees. Very professional looking. I will admit that the v neck was too low for me, so I spent a few minutes sewing it to make it a higher v neck. Other than that, I would recommend buying this dress! I am going to buy the red, and wish they offered more colors!

Fit Beautifully I am a bigger girl and needed a long dress for a semi formal wedding in Nashville in July. I wanted something the didn't look hot or dark. I looked at many, many dresses in Amazon, other sites and in stores. Since I am quite tall, nothing was either long enough or didn't fit me in my middle section. I kept looking at this dress and decided to buy and and try it. It was perfection. the elastic in the middle was extremely comfortable and the sleeves were loose enough for a larger arm. What's even better, it was long enough. I am 5'11" and wore flats and the length was just above the floor. The 'V' neckline was flattering and slimming and was perfect for wearing my pearls. I found the fabric to not wrinkle at all in my suitcase and once I hung it up and let it hang overnight, it was wrinkle free. What's even better, the fabric remained cool and comfortable during the muggy and warm weather. I am quite happy with this purchase.

It's great for the fall and winter and it looks absolutely amazing. It wraps nicely and the length is perfect. My daughter is taller than me but it didn't look nice on her. I am 5'7 and the length was perfect to on me but any taller than it would be short and look awkward. The ruffled shoulders give it an elegant touch as well and the color blue is stunning.

Meh. Cheap enough I kept it I am a size small with shapewear and a medium without. For the most accurate review I didn’t put shapewear on for this picture. I’m 135 pounds and 5’3 & 1/2. I wear between a small & medium in dresses and blouses depending on cut and where it’s manufactured. A lot of cheaper dresses I need a medium. I wear a size small in most all tops & a size 6 short in jeans and size small in skirts and leggings/yoga pants. I really want sure about how I liked this dress, but on a limited deal I got it for under $15 in September 2024. My husband liked it but honesty he rarely says no to anything I put on. So I sent the pic to my 74 year old mom & she thought it was adorable. (She was a model for years and has a keen eye for clothes) My daughter in law was on the fence about this dress but she hates dresses so I went with mom’s opinion. It’s cheaply made, it’s a size larger than my norm and it fits as it should but when I took it off and put it on or moved my arms while wearing it I could hear little tears. I haven’t worn it yet as it is a thicker fabric and it hasn’t gotten cold enough yet but I will pair it with my Dansko Ugg type boots as shown in the picture. I like having something comfy and causal to wear on date night & to church without having to carefully hand wash afterwards. I would NEVER pay more than $20 for this dress, tbh it’s just not worth it. But for a limited time deal on prime with free shipping I think it’s a good value. I’d rate the quality below Walmart & Sam’s/Costco/BJ and for the price I can get something there that has a longer return window and be able to return if it rips or gets a hole. I would not be shocked if I only get one or two seasons out of this dress. But hey, you can’t expect amazing quality for under $15 Also, yes the tops of the sleeves have a weird poof. I will be wearing it with a denim jacket to cover that up or have my mother in law try and fix it with a needle & thread cause I’m not a fan of that either. My measurements: My bust is 38 inches and my hips are 32-35 depending on shapewear with a waist of 32-35. I recently discovered the nebility shapewear and now wear it everyday under all my clothes because it has a snap crotch and replaced bras and panties & chinches my waist by 1 inch. (Not wearing here).

Great quality dress and very comfortable.

I’m 99 pounds 22 inch waist and these actually fit! i am a very skinny girl and it is hard for me to find dresses like this that actually fit tight. i bought 10 of these dresses and the long sleeve ones and i am very happy with them. they are tight in all the right places and not see through. i also bought a short shapewear body suit because these definitely show underwear lines especially the lighter color ones. i am 5’6 and it just hits the top of my foot if i leave it a little runched but if i fully pull it down it can touch the floor. i am about to spend so much money buying more. i wore the pink one to work and i can’t even lie i got at least 5 compliments from customers. i actually feel confident when i wear these. i do also have a real skims dress that i spent $80 and the quality of these dresses are so much better. they are not see through for me at all unlike my skims dress that showed my whole buttcrack.

Love this Dress! I am a XXL and this dressed fit perfectly. I don't have any full body photos, in this photo I am slightly bending because of my short friend. I am 5'7", it is perfect with heels, a little long for flats. It's lovely, I wore it to a wedding in April with a Sheer "pink" duster to dress it up. Colors were perfect and vibrant, material is quality. Will be my go-to this season for brunches! Can be worn both casually and dressed up for Spring/Summer! LOVE IT!

Great Holiday / Party Dress I am about 175 lbs and 5’4 and 40D bra. I purchased a size 12. There is some give in the dress especially in the top. I felt like although sometimes I wear size 10 the belted area doesn’t have much give and I think the 10 would have been to small to feel comfortable in on me. I thought it was a nice put together dress that I wore to my grandfather’s 80th birthday as well as for a holiday party. It wasn’t too hot and I was glad that it covered my arms without being long sleeves. I recommend and I would purchase again in different patterns.

I can't believe it - it's flattering on me, too! I am difficult to fit. It seems that no matter my current weight or how toned (or not) I am, I am forever between sizes. It's incredibly frustrating. These days I'm a size 12. I'm 5'4", 36C, 31.5" waist and 42" hip. I saw all of the positive reviews for this dress and figured that it couldn't hurt to try it on. Based on the size chart, I ordered a large. We have a wedding to go to in May, and it could potentially be perfect for that, so why not? I have red hair and pale skin, so I went with the always flattering dark green. The bodice and hip of this dress are both ruched. This emphasizes and enhances curves and hides imperfections. As expected given that this dress accommodates and 34+" waist, it's a little loose there, but otherwise, it's near perfect. I love the length, I love the ruching, I love the stretch of the forgiving fabric, I love that it's lined. I'll probably wear it with a wide, dressy belt to bring the waist in a bit more and I do wish the neckline was just a little lower and wider, showed a bit more skin, but this dress is really quite amazing. Kind of like those traveling pants from that movie so long ago? It seems to work for lots of body types. I feel good in it. And at its current price of $36.99, why not give it a try?

If I am trying to eat food of any kind (seated, or going to a buffet) they are just going to be in the way and get gross. I don't even want to think about using the restroom. They are just too long for what I want to be bothered with. The rating is really based on the sleeves being too long. I tried a different dress with similar (but shorter) sleeves and I loved the elegant look.

A simple basic dress - size down if you are a pear shape I am looking for a dress for a wedding. I am 5'4" and pear shaped. I have had 2 kids so I have my mom pooch. I'm about 165 lbs.Pros: The color is beautiful. The fabric is soft and light. I like the length, and I like the sleeves. The arm holes are not too big or too small. I like that it comes up high in the back. I feel pretty in the dress and love the movement of the skirt. Not tight around the waist. Fabric doesn't feel like it will snag easily.Cons: I should have opted for the size 10 instead of the 12. I don't fill out the top nearly enough. It is not stitched closed very high, so you really need to fill this dress out. This is a con for me, but may work for others with more up top.

True Maxi, soft and stretchy, need to size down. I am most happy with the length of this dress. Just buy the dress! :) I am not big on tighter dresses, but I fell in love with this dress. I got SO many compliments! I am 5’2” and 164lbs. I carry most of my weight in my hips. I ordered a size large, and it fit perfectly! I did wear a shaper underneath to smooth out any unflattering lumps. I didn’t have issues with the trim folding over around the top. I did spray it with hairspray to stiffen it up before wearing it (mainly because of what I read in other reviews). I do not think it would have been necessary to do so. The dress is perfect, but if you do not wear higher heeled shoes, it gets a bit frustrating dragging it around. Beautiful and comfortable I am not one to write reviews but had to with this dress. I was hesitant to get it as I typically struggle with dresses in general but a fitted dress like this I was very unsure of.I was invited very short notice to a NYE party and spent days searching and reading reviews…. I was skeptical but the reviews convinced me to go for it and I’m so happy I did, I love this dress so much. It fits amazing and the design/ detail of the dress hides any of those imperfections (cellulite). A lot of the reviews that I read before purchasing, stated that the halter was too big and I do agree. I am 5’9, 170lbs and a 32 DDD. Thankfully my momma is amazing and shortened the halter straps for me. But other than the halter ( which is an easy fix) I have no complaints or negatives. The dress was also plenty long even with heels on which us tall girlies usually struggle with. The bottom of the dress from mid thigh down is sheer… but not see through. “ sheer when the light hits it just right”. I received so many compliments on the dress! Do not question this one. Get the dress!!! I rated a 4 only because I think with all of the reviews they need to adjust the halter measurements so we as the buyer do not need to have it done.Again… GET THE DRESS!

I Received A Lot of Compliments On This Dress!! I am notorious for not leaving reviews, but when I was searching for a dress for a formal event I found out just how much they matter. Then if there were problems I had enough time to find something else. I am So Glad I ordered it. I am 5'7" and I did as they said took my measurements. I then ordered the X-Large. It was too big in the waist and under the arms. So I re-ordered the Large and it fit perfectly. Pairing it with a pair of kitten heels, it was the perfect length. And the number of compliments I received was topped off my night. (Picture attached) It it is not too thick, thin or flimsy, definitely not see through. I was quite surprised at how good it looked and the material of it. I am so glad I made the purchase and may order in a different color in case I have another event come up. Money well spent.

Pretty sequin dress I bought the burgundy sequin dress in XL. I usually wear a 14 dress as I'm about 5'4"+ and 160 lbs with a large chest (40D). The XL was fairly roomy and there is some stretch to the fabric. The dress is comfortable except for under the arms. Without the jacket on, the sequins scratch my sensitive skin on the arms. The length of the dress is just right, falling just at my knee. The jacket is very nice-- fairly sheer but adds a good look and a bit of warmth. The sequins on the cuffs of the jacket are a perfect touch. The jacket even has darts for shaping. I wish I could buy the jacket by itself! The zipper works very smoothly and I could zip it myself because there is enough stretch. The pattern of the sequins is quite pretty. If the lining fabric was a bit stiffer or thicker I think it would be more smoothing for lumpy bodies. My photos were taken without any fancy under garments. I would recommend something smoothing underneath if you're shaped like me.

Good Quality for the Price I bought the dress for a wedding. I was pleasantly surprised by how much I liked it when I came in. Fabric is thinner than advertised, but was not see through in camera flash. Dress was very comfortable to wear, very stretchy, not constricting at all, but this means there’s very little structure. It clings, not shapes, but the full bottom was very flattering on my mom tummy. The pockets do make the dress jut out slightly on the hips but are deep and functional if need be. Length was slightly longer than knee length but flattering. I am 5’7” tall. Sizing is very generous. I am 50.5”/47”/51”, which is larger than the biggest advertised size, but I ordered the 24 and it was great, but I could have definitely gone a size down even though my measurements were larger than the size I ordered. As a side note, this dress would work great for a breast feeding mom. The wrap style top is very functional, not stitched together. From some other review photos, I was afraid it would show too much cleavage, but it didn’t. Overall, I was pleased and would purchase again.

I love the dress- tips below (5'0 ft height) I bought the purple dress for a women's retreat (theme color was purple). I am 5'0 and weigh around 118 lbs. I bought one for me and my mom. I got myself the smallest size and my mom a medium. I ended up being the only one wearing the dress. My mom wanted to wear another one she bought along with her. Now... when I put it on, the dress was floor length for me, and I had to put the waist all the way up to the beginning of my chest or just below my boobs. I could take my shoes off and not trip. I wore high healed boots with it, and I still didn't trip. If you are 5'0 and you get the smallest size, either get it altered (if you have the time) or put it the way I did. It will still work and you'll still look beautiful. People who are my height will have more fabric to play with and style their dress, so get creative. Hope this helps. Pictures are included.

Back and Front covered with stains I bought the sage green color. The dress is beautifully made but covered in stains on both the front and back? I cannot believe that this was packaged and sent out to me? There are many reviews on this dress with similar stories about stains. Don't take it for granted. I actually ordered two of the dress both in different shades. The rose colored one was ok but then again, I was so upset about the sage that I didn't even bother to look closely at the rose one. They both are going back. About the dress, the colors of sage and rose are very beautiful and the quality of the fabric is thick not flimsy. The length is a maxi on my 5'4" frame so it looks elegant. My only suggestion is to go up a size if you are small at the bust and wider in the waist and hips. It will be tight and show every lump. Unless you are beautifully pencil thin the dress will need some tweeking for your body. Just go up a size. Good Luck!

"We have a red dress at home" Type of Dress I bought this 3 times because the sizes were so off compared to the size chart (and I was hoping that the dresses I received were one-offs for bad quality). It's on me for keeping it, but I was planning to wear it to a cosplay convention and thought I'd try to save it because I was running out of time. I ended up flame sealing the lace, dying the fabric, then painting the lace to match the fabric color.. it definitely looks better, but no saving the weird fit. Totally possible I have weird proportions compared to whatever they modeled this on but the back zipper is insanely long. And the rib/bust circumference is really short, so if you're bigger than a B cup it ain't gonna zip. This dress would be worth it if it was $19.99.. but $50 after tax? Absolutely not.

Great dress for a special occasion I bought this dress along with a few other options for a special occasion dinner. I ended up going with one of the other dresses, but I'm keeping this one! It's slightly big and it does have a little stretch, but I think it'll still be ok. I'm 5'5'', 205lb, and an hourglass shape and I got the 2XL but I probably could have been ok with the 1XL, too. I did wear a push-up bra (38DDD) and snip the thread at the bust that holds the dress in a more modest shape because I was wanting to put the girls on display. I could see myself wearing this for a work event with a petticoat as long as I put the modesty stitch back in place and wore a regular bra. I probably wouldn't wear this dress to an outdoor event in the summer as the fabric is a little thick and doesn't breathe well, but it would be good for cooler evenings or in the fall/winter. Over all, really love how this dress looked on me and how it made me feel!

Beautiful but disappointing. I bought this dress for a friend's wedding that I'm in. Its a dinosaur rainbow wedding and orange was chosen as my color. Picking an orange dress that doesn't make you look like an inmate or a pumpkin being plus sized is most certainly a challenge. I was thrilled when I stumbled on this dress. I was a bit wary of the price as 50$ is a lot for a single article of clothing. Placed the order immediately and received order 6 days before eta. The color is beautiful, sort of coppery but in the light definitely orange. I am 5'8" and its slightly long but not bad and pools very beautiful on the floor. But thats where the good ends. This dress looks like someone's first sewing job. There are loose and attached hanging threads on multiple places of the dress. The ruffle that will sit on my shoulder in view has a wad of visible thread where the stitch was ended. And lastly where the left sleeve is attached to the dress is completely separated. For a total of 60$ with shipping I am disappointed in the craftsmanship of the dress, although pleased with the quality material. Thankfully I can fix these issues myself as I still need this dress for the wedding, but I will be more careful when ordering in the future.

Perfect Mother’s Day photo dress! I bought this dress for a Mother’s Day photoshoot where my daughter and I were modeling for a photographer friend of ours (that’s why these are so early lol but better for planning for everyone else!) I loved it!!! The wind was really wild (you’d never know from the photos! Lol But it was about to rain and we finished JUST in time!) and the skirt never blew above the slit! I didn’t have to hold it down or anything! The bottom of the dress could fly freely with no effort from me to control it to avoid flashing the public! It is a very liberating dress! I was so happy! Regarding the FIT, I’m a little heavier than I have ever been and I’m self conscious about that at times, and I felt like it was very flattering! I’m 5’5” and 170lbs, and I bought a Medium, and I feel like I could have sized up, but was happy with what I had for the photos and I plan on losing some weight in the next few months, so it will fit perfectly by the next event I plan to wear it for (my baby’s 3 Under the Sea themed birthday party!) I’m really happy with this dress overall! I would easily recommend 😁 I also got some compliments from people at the park and my photographer friend said that it was “classy and beautiful, but kinda sexy too” Lol

Perfect for packing and a wedding I bought this dress for a wedding on the beach but the reception was at a more event venue. I was also traveling internationally so I was so concerned about packing and creases. It packed WONDERFULLY, no creases and I just folded flat. It was also July and hot & humid for this wedding. I wore a biker short-like slip under it and no sweat marks across your bottom (as we were sitting on plastic padded chairs in the sun). It is a stretchy, nylon so thought it would show but it didn't. I have an hourglass figure but 36D almost DD so finding dresses that fit in all the places is hard without looking like I am wearing a moo moo. The material is also full coverage, no concerns about seeing through to under garments, only lines but that is the same for any form fotting dress. I would buy again in multiple colors. Happy packing and having fun with friends!

Nice formal dress I bought this dress for a wedding. I would give it a solid 4 stars. The fabric is thick but flows nicely. It is a very flattering fit for someone who is 5'1" and 150 pounds (and not horribly long). I did not need to have it altered (and can wear flats without it dragging on the floor). I bought the green and it's a very nice dark green (as pictured). The slit is a bit bigger than normal but it isn't too revealing or strange. The only thing I notice as a downside is the way the dress is sewn. It definitely has a cheaper look to the ends of the sleeves but, from a distance, you can't see it. It didn't wrinkle too badly in the shipping process but I am getting it dry cleaned prior to the event I'm attending. Update: I have worn this to 2 events and it is definitely a great dress! It doesn't wrinkle as easily as other fabric types (while being worn), so maybe it was in the packaging for a long time? It is very flattering and looks like it cost more than you paid. Overall, I would recommend it to anyone who is on the shorter side for a mid/floor length dress.

Beautiful Formal Gown for an Affordable Price! I bought this dress for formal night on a cruise ship. I’m an 8/10, 5’7 145lbs, I ordered a size 10 and had them put a zipper in back instead of the corset back. It fits well. I’m wearing a strapless bra to give my front more support, which made for a little bit tighter zip up in the back, but just barely. The dress is long and has a train in the back, which is fun. The slit doesn’t naturally open as you walk so if you don’t really want to show off the slit, it’s totally great, or you can parse it apart and make it more obvious. I wish the points on the top had some boning in them so they don’t flip over as shown in the photo, but it doesn’t look too bad. I just pulled it of the box so I’m hoping once it’s pressed it won’t flip over as much in those corner tips. But overall a great buy if you’re looking for a great formal down but don’t want to spend $$$$$. Would recommend!

Size down for shorter stature or smaller chest I bought this dress in a S and M because I am using it as a maternity style wedding dress. The small would have been a decent fit for me pre-pregnancy (5'0", 130lbs), but I needed the medium to give my belly a bit more room. The stretch on the entire dress is great, so if you plan to use a shaper, I would possibly size down. The belly/hip area has a lot of room, as does the chest. I'm a 36 C and couldn't fill out the medium top. this was more obvious than the belly having more room, and needed to be fixed. I ended up getting the dress altered and got 3 inches removed from the length of the torso section, and this made it just about perfect. It's pretty darn good quality for the price, and the stretch is awesome. The fabric is thick enough that it doesn't look super tight. I think this dress is ideal for someone with a bigger belly/hip and chest area.

Great dress in any color, EXCEPT white I bought this dress in navy and it’s amazing! I’m 6’, 195lbs, tall and thicker in the legs and butt. I purchased a size XL, and it fits great. So good I bought it 3 times I bought this dress in navy in 2018 for a gala, and again in black in 2019 for a funeral. Here I am in 2023 buying a third one in dark red/ maroon for a wedding. I guess it’s time I write a review. This dress falls into that rare category of being worth what you pay, but being able to pass for more. Unlike many dresses on here it’s thicker fabric, that lays correctly on the body - unlike the lightweight cheap options you usually find on this site, it hangs down and doesn’t cling. It has a nice lining layer underneath to act as a slip, and the pleats fall perfectly in front. I went with a size Large. I am 5’5”, and usually a size 14 jean and 34-36D bra. I added a belt I found here on amazon to break up my waist line as well. I always receive compliments on these dresses. It’s definitely a basic simple dress that can work in many occasions, but with the added value of being from amazon. Here’s hoping they don’t come out with more dark colors that warrant me buying a fourth version in the future.

Love it! Fit great! I bought this dress in royal blue for my daughter to wear to homecoming where a modest style dress was required. This dress was perfect for the occasion! It fit my daughter almost perfectly, which is saying a lot as she's a very tall and slim young teenager. She's 5'2 and the dress in small hit right below her knees. The Lacy material of this dress is silky soft and lightweight. The neck line is see through, the actual bodice of the dress hit a little low on her chest, but with the right bra, it works. Bodice is fitted at the waist, then flows freely to the knee with ample material. There is a matching underlining that prevents the dress from being see through throughout, the material is also soft and lightweight. The ribbon for the waist is not attached to the dress, nor are there sewn in loops to secure the ribbon to the dress, however, this offers more options on how to wear, with or without the ribbon, ribbon tied to the front, or as my daughter did, ribbon tied to the back. The ribbon did stay in place the entire night with no sliding or untying. Overall, I love this dress! The silky soft Lacy material is perfect for a dress or casual night out depending on the shoes worn! It fits as the sizing chart says, so measure before buying. I'm so glad I did! She received so many compliments for this dress, and was the only one wearing it, which in the small City we live in is difficult to do. The Royal blue is true to color, very rich, and very pretty on!

I wash in cold water in a laundry bag and hang dry and it looks brand new even after 5 years. At the time of these photos my measurements were: 34 bust, 25 waist, 39 hips, I weighed 125 lbs and am 5'3", ordered size small.

Beautiful and heavy I bought this dress in the emerald green y-velvet floral option (the "color" name is so long) in a size XL. For sizing reference, I'm usually a medium or large on top and am currently either a 36E/36F. In bottoms and jeans, I'm usually a medium-large or a 8-12/29-31, and if it helps, I wear a size 6 or 8 in Lulu leggings. I'm 5'3" tall with a short torso, and my measurements are about 44"-33"-44" (bust-waist-hip) right now, give or take. I'd say this is TTS, or you could potentially size down. I got this to wear to a work holiday party coming up next month, and I felt this pretty velvet floral was the perfect choice for something like that. I sized up because I have a larger bust and wanted to make sure I had plenty of room, but I should have stuck with my usual size medium or large; either probably would have been good. My husband commented that this size looked really baggy, and I agree, though I'm sure I could still get away with wearing it. The material is heavy and absolutely stunning. I tried to take several pictures to really show the way the fabric lays on the body and the sheen the velvety floral pattern has, but I don't think I did it justice. The dress is double layered, as that floral material is actually sheer. The fluttery sleeves don't have a layer beneath so are just a tiny bit see-through, which I liked. The fit is pretty typical to a wrap dress, but I love that it has a slit. It isn't too obvious, so it's nothing you'll notice if you're just standing, as you can see in the two photos I took where I'm not really showcasing it - I honestly wish it was a little more obvious. As for the top, it has a little silver metal snap to keep it from falling open, but I really wish they'd instead done a black plastic snap, even though it wouldn't be as sturdy in the long run. I just feel the silver is super obvious against the dark fabric and I didn't personally love it. I would probably remove the snap all-together and just let the top stay a little more open, or maybe throw a little stitch in it to keep it where I want it. Not really a complaint since it's such a tiny detail and can be easily removed, but I wanted to mention it. By the way, this dress is a FAUX WRAP style, which it does point out, but I still wanted to mention it. My only real complaint about this dress is the price, but I guess for the quality, it isn't bad. It just felt steep for an Amazon dress. Overall, I really do love this dress but ended up returning it because it just felt too big. I have a few other dresses I'm waiting to try out, but if those don't work out, I'll probably reorder this in a smaller size. I'd definitely recommend it. I think this is really perfect for a holiday party and it's a more unique material than other dresses I've found on Amazon.

Adorable cut I bought this dress in white after seeing it on a friend at her graduation party. It is so adorable! The cut outs are cute but not too revealing and it gives me a perfect shape. The fabric is light (important here in a Texas summer) but not see through. Planning to buy another in a darker color for a friends wedding! 5’2” 120lbs, a small was exactly right!

Cute party dress for a tween I bought this dress in XXS for my 12 yo for a holiday party. She’s very petite, wears a girls 10/12, 4’9” and 85 lbs, so it’s difficult to find clothes to fit her style. She wanted purple so I bought both shades because it was difficult to tell the difference from the photos on Amazon. The “violet” is more of red purple, as shown on the left. We kept the more blue of the purples. Price is right for Ok quality, and the dress is lined. No zipper and the straps are very thin, so the wearer needs to know not to pull the dress on and off by the straps. The glitter did not come off, as we’ve seen from similar material. Size up if you want a roomier fit - it’s very stretchy and can be pulled up or down for length.

Nice dress for price! I bought this dress last minute as a bridesmaid dress for my brothers wedding bc my other one wasn’t coming in on time and I’m happy I did! It was a very nicely made dress for the price and I got lots of compliments on it! The chocolate brown color was really pretty and rich but I was surprised it was shiny satin since the listing didn’t look shiny, but I liked that about it. The slit goes all the way up to where it starts so I got that fixed when I got it hemmed because I’m 5’3” and it was too long but I figured I’d need it hemmed anyway. I wish I would’ve sized down to a 10 instead of 12 but that’s not on the dress, I just had a baby 3 weeks prior to wearing and didn’t know what size to get. The fabric was not see through at all and good quality! I got lots of compliments which was nice considering how all women usually feel postpartum like I was. The corset and the gathering in the front were nice to help cover anything I was feeling insecure about! Glad I found this dress and ordered it last minute!

I bought this dress to wear to a cocktail party fund raiser event. It was a hit! I got a lot of compliments and it was comfortable and I felt great. Beautiful dress I bought this dress to wear to a destination wedding. I’m 5’7” about 135 and it fit like a glove. I liked it because you can wear it with or without a bra and though the material is slightly thick, it works in the heat because it absorbs the sweat better than a lot of fabric that show sweat. It’s not see through it all. It’s comfy and I got a ton of compliments on the color. It is very bright but it was perfect for the occasion I wore it to. I would get it in another color for another occasion.

Perfect Wedding Attire I bought this dress to wear to a fall wedding. My husband had purchased a blue suit and I wanted a dress and shoes that would complement his suit. This dress is a beautiful navy blue, with a beautiful lace design. The hem is a hi-low hem which is very flattering. We got many compliments on how well we matched each other. The dress itself fit exactly as expected, true to size. I only gave 4 out of 5 stars for stretch because it didn't feel very stretchy to me. I did not buy it for the stretch feature and I did not need any additional stretch. If you are looking for that, I didn't feel as if this dress offered "stretch". The color is a true navy blue, which was exactly what I was looking for. I wore it for a few hours and it was very comfortable, no complaints. For reference, I am 5'7" and 130 lbs. I purchased a small, which is generally what I wear in tops and it fit perfectly! I would recommend this item to friends and I have already considered purchasing additional colors!

Comfortable & Affordable I bought this dress to wear to a formal wedding in warm weather and loved it. Likes: lightweight, easy to wear, flattering, comfortable, adjustable straps, stretchy material in the back The tie is tricky, I don’t have a very big chest so was able to tie it pretty tight without worrying about spilling out, but did feel that my chest looked a little smooshed. I wore nipple covers just in case I had a malfunction, but the tie stayed in place all night! The material isn’t the highest quality, but reasonable for the price. Received many compliments and would purchase again. 5’3, 150 lbs, 34B, size Medium

A Beautiful Dress for Tall, Curvy Girls I bought this dress to wear to a Harlem Renaissance theme event. This dress fit like it was made based on my own measurements. I received dozens of compliments. I only gave it four stars because it was extra long. I’m 5’9 and in 4 1/2 inch heels, I still had to hold the hemline while dancing to avoid the heel of my shoe from getting caught. Exactly as described! I bought this dress to wear to a wedding and I'm impressed! Very comfortable material, double-lined yet breathable. I took pictures with and without a petticoat for comparison. I have a 32" waist so I got a size large and it's a tiny bit big, I probably could have worn a medium with the stretch but this way my body is able to flex and change throughout the day without sacrificing comfort. My only complaint (which isn't very important) is that I thought the bow would come attached to the dress however it's a separate ribbon you have to tie yourself. Overall 5 stars I am so happy with this purchase!!

Super flattering! I bought this dress to wear to Universal Studios, along with a Harry Potter Gryffindor sweater. I am 165 pounds, 5'2" and a 36DD and the XL fit perfectly. I added a wide, stretchy belt which I think finished off the outfit. I am also in my 60's and by no means skinny, and this dress is so flattering that I will be wearing it solo too, after things warm up a bit. It has some stretch, is not sheer and other than needing a tiny bit of touch up with an iron initially, is absolutely perfect! The sweater is Harry Potter's Womens Gryffindor house open front cardigan, XL, also purchased on Amazon, just in case there are other nerdy ladies out there who want to look amazing while they are out for dinner and drinks at Universal!

Beautiful and high quality! I bought this dress with high hopes and it did not disappoint! The bodice is full lined and fit like a glove. The lace work was beautiful. I purchased a size 6, and for measurements, I am about 33” in the chest, 5’ 8”, 120lbs. And did not mend any alterations. (Since it is an empire waist dress, it is very forgiving below the rib cage.) The dress came packaged well and only needed a little steam to release the folding wrinkles in the chiffon. The only negative is that I ordered two sizes- one was never sent & I didn’t receive a notice that it wasn’t coming. (It was a smaller size and thankfully I didn’t need it!!) So, keep an eye on your account if shipping seems long. The dress came quickly, only a few weeks after ordering. Other than that- what a beautiful dress for a fraction of what it would have cost in a bridal shop or dress shop!

Soft, comfy and cute! I bought this dress with the intention to take my pregnancy bump pictures in weekly. I find myself wearing it all the time now. It hugs your body so nicely and it’s incredibly soft. I am 5’7 and weigh 125 lbs, I ordered a medium and it’s perfect 🤩

Beautiful but Doesn't Last I bought this during a frantic search for the perfect Fall dress for a last-minute family photoshoot. I had a very specific style and colorway in mind and this was the closest I could find style-wise that also came in my size. For size reference, I'm 5'6" and about 240lbs. I usually wear xl or 2x and, following others' reviews, I went with the 2xl. It was a little long (as expected) and I had to safety pin the chest area as it is a DEEP v neckline. Other than that, it fit great! It has just enough stretch to be forgiving in all the right places but it also flowed wonderfully. The only thing that made me give it only 4 stars is that after only wearing it twice, it looks like the fabric has worn in the the area around where my belt was. That's disappointing but, as I will likely always wear it with a belt, I'm hoping it won't be very noticeable.

WOW! Just W O W!!!! I bought this eleven months ago and I've worn at least six other gowns to previous events this year because l forgot l had this one. When l pulled it out and tried it on l fell in love with it all over again. It very flattering AND forgiving. I hemmed the front, it was a bit too long, and tapered it to give a slight train. You can wear it on or off the shoulder as well. The sequins and design of the gown makes it classy enough that very little jewelry is needed (otherwise it starts to look gawdy.) As an event photographer rarely am I photographed, but people insisted l pose at least once. I'm so glad l did, because this gown was giving what it was supposed to give. Buy it, you will certainly love it!! 5'4, 168-170lb, XL (I like form fitting gowns HOWEVER, since l'm photographing in it I need to be really comfortable otherwise a L would be great. Even a M with a good body shaper would work.)

Great dress! I bought this for "formal" night for a cruise. I bought a rhinestone sash to go with it (didn't use) but it looked really pretty and REALLY dressed it up. I'm 5'8, 135 and got the medium. This dress is very comfortable and if you have a racer back bra there are no bra issues like with most dresses out there these days. I wore 4 inch heels so the dress was a little short for my liking but most people have stated it's long. It would have been perfect with flats. For the price, you can't go wrong. It came smelly...not sure...but the smell came out after I washed it.

DON'T HESITATE I bought this for a black tie wedding and was really uncertain about what to expect. I wear a size 14/16 and am a 36DDD so strapless and buying online seemed risky. However, this dress exceeded all my expectations. The seller reached out after I placed my order to confirm my measurements or ask if I wanted custom for free (which I did). It arrived in about a week made of heavy fabric that was surprisingly not super wrinkled and once laced in, it fit like a charm. I received tons of compliments, it photographed great and now I just need to get invited to another wedding so i can wear it again!

Love it! I bought this for a formal wedding. Very flattering and nice material. I have a small chest and waist and larger hips and thighs. I’m 5ft 4in 135lbs and I ordered a small.

Homecoming Gala Dress I bought this for a fundraising Gala. I am 5’8”and 215 lbs I ordered an XXL. The elegant black dress with gold appliqué is a true showstopper. The contrast between the deep black fabric and the intricate gold appliqué creates a stunning visual impact. The craftsmanship is impeccable, with every detail meticulously executed. The dress fits like a dream, hugging the body in all the right places without feeling constricting. It's perfect for a special occasion or a formal event, exuding sophistication and grace. The combination of the classic black color and the opulent gold accents makes it a timeless piece that will never go out of style. This dress is not just an outfit; it's a work of art that elevates any woman's wardrobe.

Wonderful dress, for any occasion I bought this for a holiday party, but am definitely going to wear this for many more occasions to come. I'm 5'3 and 275 lbs, with most of my weight in the belly area. The 3X fit wonderfully on me. It hits midway down my calf, and the fabric is stretchy enough that it could accommodate larger busts. I'm a 48C and the girls sat well in this dress with ample coverage. The off-the-shoulder sleeves cover enough of my arms that I don't feel so self-conscious about my floppy underarms. I dressed it up with a belt, but even without one, the cut of the dress gives the look of a defined waist. The fabric is surprisingly thick and actually kept me decently insulated on a 52 degree night. I've tried a petticoat underneath and decided it's not necessary (stylistically, it looks cute though). The dress has a great A-shape on its own. I love this and will probably get this in black too. It's a beautiful, classic, multi-use look. Could not recommend more. I felt and looked amazing in this dress, and received complements all night.

Great dress especially for the price! I bought this for a last minute formal banquet because it was the only dress I could find that I liked that would arrive overnight. I don’t love that it’s white (hello bridal vibes), but it’s lovely nonetheless. For ordering, DO follow the size chart. I’m 6’0”, 200 lbs, normally a 14/16 and the 2xl fits almost perfectly. Overall, good price for a lovely and comfortable dress!

I bought this for my Prom this year, and let me just say…This is by far the best dress I’ve ever worn. For reference, I’m 5’5”, and a size 16 in dresses normally, but I sized up a few sizes because I was worried about it not being completely true to the measurements. It is very true to size, and I ended up having to tie the corset completely shut to fit in it lol. All I had to do was take in the shoulders slightly, and hem the bottom (I probably could have gotten away with the tea length). Other than that, this dress was absolutely perfect. To my surprise, this gown HAD POCKETS which I utilized the entire night happily, even though they were a bit too shallow for my phone to stay secure in. I noticed at the end of the night I had a small tear in the top layer of tulle just above my pocket , but that was most likely my fault, as my corsage bracelet caught onto it multiple times (because it was a metal bracelet). The cut of the dress is a bit too awkward for most bras, but the cups are boned, so I ended up just wearing pasties. The lining of this dress was very silky, and not scratchy at all, it was actually very comfy to wear, and the dress dried out very quickly after my group got caught in the rain (I know it’s not intended for this, but still, very convenient). Overall, I would give this dress a 6/5 if I could, I paired this with a pair of Star drop-style earrings, a gold necklace, black heels, and a gold headband, and received so many compliments on my outfit.

Great Looking Suit I bought this suit for my 89 year old mom. Everything was pretty good quality. I wasn't crazy about the type of fabric. It is kind of a satin/satineen type. Besides the fabric, I did have one other thing I wish was different. Along the bottom of the jacket, the rhinestone band is cut straight at the ends where the jacket comes together. This causes the ends not the have rhinestone coverage. If the band would have cut at an angle, it would have covered all of the fabric. I know what I am saying may kind of confusing, but the coverage was not a deal breaker for me anyway. (There is a picture but if difficult to see all of it.) As far as the fit, I purchased her an 18 which is what she normally wear. The skirt was perfect! It was like I had it taylor made for her. She received so many compliments and I thought she looked simply marvelous.

Long dress for tall girls! I bought this to go to a gala. I was 170lbs, 5’8” and about 5’11” with heels. This dress was long enough and perfect! I did not want my ankles or shoes showing. Beautiful dress! I bought this to wear to a December wedding at 7 months pregnant and again for maternity photos in early February. I am 5’3”, D cup, and about 145-155 when I wore this dress. I purchased the Medium after reading ALL the other reviews and was overall pleased with the fit. It was too long for my style, though it wasn’t dragging on the floor either, so I did hem it about 4 inches , so that it was more ankle length. The other fit issue was the sleeves....they seemed to be very loose and baggy on my forearms and wrists(and I’m pretty athletic/muscular!) With the stretch, it would have been just fine if they were a little more fitted. Also, the green was a deep, gorgeous color and the material heavy, but in a good way. (It’s durable but easy to sew.)I felt very glamorous and received many compliments on this dress.

Perfect for a last minute purchase I bought this with overnight shipping so that I could get it in time for a wedding, I was very skeptical about ordering a large since the measurements said I’d fit into an x large even tho I wear large in dresses. I seen some of the other reviews of women with the same measurements as me so I went for a large and it fit PERFECTLY, it has quit a bit of stretch too. I’m around 180lbs 5'7 and wear a 38-40C.

It's a keeper I bought this without it having been reviewed, so I really want to share my thoughts. I like it, I ordered three and this is the one I'm keeping. (Note to shorter women: the cute full legged flowery print jumpsuits may not be flattering.) This looks better than my awful pic. It seems well made, I only had to cut off one small thread and the seams are fine. Mine is in navy blue and it is a true navy. It's dressy without glitz, just right. I love bling as much as the next gal, but sometimes it can look cheap. This applique is classy, a nice touch without being overpowering. I'm 5'3", 136 pounds and I ordered my usual medium, so it is true to size. The woven material has some stretch and give to it, which makes it comfortable, but it is dressier than a knit. It is hard to zip by myself, but I've mastered it and I'm not double jointed. When you are pulling the zipper up, pull the whole zipper base down, allowing you to zip it up higher to the point that you can then reach the top of the zipper and finish pulling it up. It did come slightly wrinkled but given the fabric, I think that was to be expected. I do have a good steamer, and with a bit of time they came out. I think you could use a regular iron on low, but I didn't, so proceed carefully if that is what you do. I think jumpsuits can be problematic, but this one is just what I wanted and I'm very happy with it.

One much better than the other! I bought two of these both in size medium—the pink floral and black polka dot. They are a very good price and I needed a dress quick to wear to a wedding shower. I would have kept them both. The odd thing is that no matter how many times I tried them both on, the pink floral was not flattering on my body. The pink one seemed to accent every pudgy pillow, bulge, and panty line. The darker color really did look better. Also, the pink floral one seemed to highlight more the vintage style of ruffles on the bodice and it reminded me of the aprons that my grandmother used to wear when I was a child. The black polka dot dress didn’t seem to do that. I kept and wore the black polka dot dress to the shower and am returning the pink floral. The dresses are unlined and the fabric feels a bit like crepe (slightly rough texture—not soft or silky feeling but stretchy and comfortable). They zip down the back. As a side benefit I wasn’t planning on, the theme of the wedding shower was in the style of two famous mouses and the polka dot dress fit in perfectly with that! I think I might wear that again as MM for Halloween! For reference, I am almost 5’ tall and weight 129 lbs. and got size medium which fits fine. I write honest reviews to help others make informed purchases because I read reviews myself and appreciate how they can be. I hope that my review helped you!

Gorgeous Perfect Dress! I can’t believe how much I love this dress! Last minute invite to a black tie affair in the post-prom desert of local dress selections left me reluctantly scrolling Amazon. It arrived in a garment bag on a hanger, rolled to minimize wrinkles. The pics were taken fresh out of the Amazon package. The top fits easily and so flattering across the clavicle. Soft, stretchy yet quality fabric. I am wearing a standard bra and it is (barely) covered in the back. The bottom is magical. The color fade is lovely. It feels like a very high quality gown and would be flattering to many body types. I’m just under 5’7” and 140 LBs. The hem hits exactly on my toes with 2.5 inch heels. If you are under my height, you would want to go pretty tall on the heels lest the hem drag. My only regret is ordering a rented dress from rent the runway because I didn’t trust this dress to be as amazing as it is!

Smokin! I can’t believe I paid so little for this dress. The fabric is thick and substantial, but with great stretch. It’s form-fitting in all the right places and gives me curves I’m pretty sure I don’t actually have. So, so flattering! The blue is a deep jewel tone, and the dress looks much more expensive than it actually is. For reference, I’m just about 5’9”, 125ish pounds, size 2-4, and a 32A. I can wear a regular bra with this dress, but will need some fashion tape to keep the straps in place. Some Spanx wouldn’t hurt, either - this dress is body-hugging! - but the fabric is so substantial (mildly supportive, even) I could probably get away without wearing them if I had to. (But why would I do that? Tight dress = Spanx) You should probably order this dress, just saying.

Gorgeous! Take your measurements and go by the chart. I can't believe it's even possible to get such a nice dress for this price! Ordered for a "garden cocktail attire" wedding. AMAZING! I cannot believe that I found a wedding dress on Amazon and that it was as inexpensive as it was but made so well. I was looking for a reception dress... Something sparkly, poofy, and overall, princess-like... Because when else will I have the chance to wear such a dress? I have a classic, elegant dress for the ceremony that I got from David's Bridal, but I wasn't going back there for another dress. It wasn't the best experience the first time and I wasn't looking to spend on a reception dress, as much as I did on the ceremony dress. I thought well, how bad could it be to look on Amazon and order something to try on? If I don't like it, I can send it back. I am utterly shocked and BEYOND happy with this gown. I also bought a hoopless petticoat to fill out the bottom and I'm wearing it in the pictures I attached to this review. Get the petticoat... You ordered a puffy dress, might as well embrace it. And I recommend the hoopless kind so when you sit, the dress doesn't stand up straight. Also, if it's windy, you see the hoops when the skirt material presses against the hoop. That doesn't happen with the hoopless kind. The back is a corset so it's forgiving in sizing and hips don't really factor in with this gown because it's so poofy. My only issue is that it is long. I am planning to wear flats so the dress is dragging on the ground by about 3 inches. If you wear high heels, or are taller than 5'5", then the length should be fine. I HIGHLY recommend this gown. Dream come true, really. For reference, I am 5'5", 34 D, 150 pounds, 37" chest, 31" waist, and 43" hips. I ordered both a size 8 and a 10. I tried on the 8 and it fit like a glove. I didn't even bother to take the 10 out to try it on. UPDATE: I had my seamstress add a sequined lace to the bottom of the tule skirt. I thought it would bring a bit more sparkle to the skirt part of the dress and it did that. But it also made the dress feel more finished. I'm beyond happy that I did that. (You can see the additional pictures of that in my review.)

I read some reviews about the tie looking poorly in the front?? The tie goes on the back! You can adjust the depth of the neckline with these ties. If I tie it completely closed it brings the neckline up more modest. The picture shows the straps tied leaving about a 5 inch gap. If you wanted more cleavage just leave a larger distance between the panels when you tie the back straps. I purchased a lavender slip from amazon seller Ekouaer for $14.99. Description Women's Nightgown Satin Slip Dress Sexy Lingerie Sleepwear Long Slip Silk Midi Dress Spaghetti Strap in size Medium. It is silk, not satin, so it isnt shiny. Its soft and lightweight. Lavender matches the purple dress perfectly, but could be used under any color dress (without lace panels). The slip lines the dress in the breast area, allowing braless or extra bra coverage. It's long enough to line to the lower, 2nd lace panel. The straps on the Slip are shoulder ties which allowed me to adjust the height of the slips neckline, so it would not show. I just tied a knot in each of the 2 straps where the back strap attaches to the back of the slip. I plan to wear this to my nieces outdoor wedding. I sent the bride a picture for approval and she loves it. I plan to order an ombre long scarf as a jacket for the evening reception. I ordered some colorful cream, lavender, purple and pink patent pumps but unsure if that will work. If not I will probably order nude, eggplant, deep maroon, ox blood or aubergine color pumps. This shade of purple is light, powdery, making it so versitile. I will coordinate my purse & jewelry once I have the shoes figured out, to tie the two colors together. I hope my review helps others make the best choice in size & color. I am very pleased with my Amazon purchase.

Gorgeous, Comfortable Formal Dress I chose this beautiful dress to wear for my son's wedding. It was so classy and comfortable! I ordered a medium based on the size chart, but I think I may have been able to go with the small. It was just a little bit big on me, for reference I am normally a size 6 in misses. The length was perfect for me! I am 5'7" and wore about 2" heels, it was long enough and did not touch the floor. I love that it is machine washable. I washed it (on gentle) before wearing it and after the wedding, hung to dry, no problems at all. My only concern was the zipper, it gets a little tight passing the seams at the waist, but I was careful when zipping and it was fine. It's a very comfortable, classy, gorgeous dress. I'm very glad I chose it for such a special occasion.

The perfect wedding dress! I chose this dress as my wedding dress and I LOVED it. I'm 5'6 and did not wear heels so the dress was kind of long. The chest area was a loose fit, I'm a 36 B bra size, so I did not expect it to fit perfectly. The only alteration I did was add a safety pin to close the gap. It was the PERFECT dress for my PERFECT day. People thought it was way more expensive than it was. 🥰

buy it I chose this dress last minute for a wedding over one from Lucy in the Sky that was twice the price. The fabric was so much thicker than expected and photographed so well! I am very short (5 ft) and bigger chested (30 DD), so dresses normally don't flatter my body type, but I ordered an XS and it was so beautiful on. The fabric in the back draped down much lower than on the taller girls in the reviews, though. The front fabric on the boob area has no stretch, so I did have to flatten the girls with boob tape to fit the dress over. There's silicone there so it won't fall, too. If you don't need tape I would still recommend nipple covers! Fabric is thick but will show if you're cold lol. I'd cut the hanger straps too, they show in the open back when you tuck them in. Overall great dress, got so many compliments.

LOVE this dress! Flattering & Comfortable. I chose this dress over 5 department store dresses. I liked it as soon as I put it on. It’s flattering, comfortable and flowy. I wore it to a wedding and received compliments on it throughout the night. For a big girl, that felt good. I bought my regular size (XL - 16) and it fit perfectly. I have a large chest (38DDD) and the top fit without being tight or restrictive. I did have to sew a stitch at the cleavage because the top cross over part was a little gappy. I am 5' 4" tall and the front hit at the knee, the back at the top of my ankle. Perfect! I like that it has an elastic waist so it’s not moomoo-ish but wasn’t crazy about the way the elastic looked so I bought a black Obi belt and it worked out perfectly. (Brand Obi belt I bought was Ayliss here on Amazon- but any "one size fits all" brand would do). It really dressed up the whole look. (See picture-even though it’s a little dark). The dress will need to be ironed when you get it. I turned it inside out and a medium high setting with steam on ironed out all the wrinkles and made it beautifully flowy.

Beautiful and so chic I consider my body curvy with annoyingly large breasts (36G) which initially made me hesitate when buying this. I decided to give it a chance with some breast tape to go for a backless look despite my previous struggles with these styles. WOW, it was incredible. The satin is thicker than I expected which did a great job at draping over the various curves and pooches of my stomach and breasts as well as doing a good job at hiding the tape. Even though it isn’t a fitted style, the silhouette was slimming. I loved the adjustable band in the back which is a must with large breasts. The yellow color is absolutely stunning and perfect for spring/summer weddings. After steaming the creases out, it looks so luxurious. This dress definitely won’t support larger breasted folks, but with the right accessories, you can definitely pull off this backless look and still feel supported! I only took one star off because the lining was shorter than the length of the dress which mildly shows through the light colored fabric. Wasn’t a big enough deal for me to change how I felt about the dress. Definitely give it a try

Elegant, versatile, AND comfortable! I could wear this dress to a wedding, or to a block party, and it would look great at both places! Things to note: - The top is lined, but not the bottom. However, it is not at all see-through! Dark under clothes do not show through. - It is very well-made. The seams are even and flat, and the drape is perfect. - You will need to iron it. - The straps are tie design, so you can adjust where you would like to put them. I tried them lower in the back and up on the shoulders. - There is a detached tie belt that you can either use her not, to your discretion. - For reference, I am 5‘2“, approximately 110 pounds. I ordered a large, not being sure about online sizing. The large fits like a size 8 dress on me. But that’s fine, because I cannot stand anything tight or binding. I’m sure I would’ve been fine with a size smaller, but I like this one. - The green is a very cool shade of green, no warm or gold undertones. It’s a very misty and beautiful shade of green.

Maybe the greatest deal in Amazon history! I could write an essay about this dress. With my daughter’s wedding quickly approaching, I panicked about a week before, thinking the dress I had would be too tight and that it wasn’t making the “mother of the bride” statement I wanted. I scrolled through the Bezos Online Boutique and found this and thought “This is too good to be true.” I knew I wanted blue and I needed it yesterday. Only the XXL was available to get to me in time but you never really know what you’re going to get anyway so let’s roll the dice! Am I right? It fine well, not perfect but not terrible. For reference, I am about a 38/40 C/D. It depends on the bra. The sides were a little loose but the straps were adjustable so thst helped some. Some undergarment tape might have helped a little but it’s Texas. Length was a bit long. I am 5’2” so everything is long. It’s how I live. I added a petticoat under, which I trimmed about 2 inches off of and the dress looked great. I only got tripped up once and it was because I had forgotten to take the tags off. I danced all night and the dress held up. I felt like the sides got a little looser throughout the night. But I don’t think it was super obvious. I got so many compliments on this. An absolute steal! If I had time and my daughter said yes, I would have done the apricot in XL instead and I’m guessing it would have been a perfect fit.

You need to buy this dress !!! I couldn't wait to try this on. Despite all the good reviews, it's better than I anticipated. I'm a big girl being 5'9", 250lbs. Such an EFFORTLESS piece! Get your cameras out!! I decided at the very last minute (2 days before my 60th birthday) that I needed to commemorate an occasion as auspicious as admittance into the ELITE 60+ club with a mini photo shoot. I literally opened Amazon and searched "Photo Shoot Dresses" Found this one. I almost chickened out... it arrived 3 hours before my phot shoot... I took off my work clothes and literally pulled this over my head... I was wearing Spanx Boy shorts.. nothing else. I knew it would photograph like a much more expensive gown. BUT, for what I wanted it was PERFECT... I am 5'11" wearing heels. I purchased in a 2x...it felt like I could have down a size but when I see the pictures, Im certain I was JUST RIGHT.

Love it! I decided fairly last minute to change a dress I was going to wear to a wedding and was pressed on time. As the wedding was going to be outside in the afternoon on an extremely hot day, I decided to go a shorter length than what I had. I am a fan of halter tops so that drew my attention, plus it looked like it would be a fun dress to dance in. I read all the reviews first and saw everyone responded so positively. I also took it to consideration that many said to size down, as I was contemplating between a small and medium. I am 5’3” and smaller on the top than the bottom so with the other reviews, I did not want this to seem big. Getting the small was the best decision as it fit perfectly (not oversized on the armholes, perfect length) and because of the style, it was fine on my curvier bottom half and laid nicely. The color seemed to be a touch more of a periwinkle than dusty blue, but I absolutely loved it, and it looked great with my silver and gold accessories. Got so many compliments on it…you would never know from the look and quality that I paid so little for it. Just plan on giving it a little steam due to it being packaged, but that’s all it needed.

Getting the small was the best decision as it fit perfectly (not oversized on the armholes, perfect length) and because of the style, it was fine on my curvier bottom half and laid nicely. The color seemed to be a touch more of a periwinkle than dusty blue, but I absolutely loved it, and it looked great with my silver and gold accessories. Got so many compliments on it…you would never know from the look and quality that I paid so little for it. Just plan on giving it a little steam due to it being packaged, but that’s all it needed.

This dress is perfection!! I decided to purchase this dress at the last minute for a wedding I was attending and it did not disappoint! For size referencing I'm just shy of 5'6", 150lbs curvier/athletic build/bottom heavy, usually a 6 in jeans (with stretch for my hips), 34B chest. I wanted the dress form-fitting so I went with the small and it fit like a dream. The material was nice and thick, it has the kind of stretch that tucks you in and hugs the right places. I have fairly broad shoulders but am part of the itty-bitty committee due to a large amount of weightloss, and the chest was even snug enough that it helped a bit with cleavange. Just an incredibly flattering fit, even the way the stitching follows your curves gives that compliment to your overall figure. It was a very comfortable wear for the whole evening, and I received tons of compliments. I'm already planning on purchasing more colors for upcoming occasions! Get the dress!!

Partially see-through fabric. I deducted a star for this Cooan sequined fishtail dress because the fabric is partially see-through and all the sequins don't make it opaque enough. Why can't I find a sequined clothing item that isn't see-through?! It's frustrating. This dress is even lined but the lining is also see-through. Why?? So, be cognizant of your undergarments and/or be careful wearing this in certain lighting.I ordered the Medium and it fits my 38C chest and 34" waist nice and snug. I would have normally purchased a Large but that size wasn't available at the time I ordered. The Medium fits me very nicely but there's very little room to spare. Also, because I sized down, this dress winds up making my stomach stick out more than I like.The lining of the dress isn't the softest but it's mostly tolerable for my sensitive skin. I like how the sequins are in rows instead of just scattered everywhere. The rows give the dress a more refined and elegant sparkle.I couldn't get the entire skirt in my photo due to a counter in my way, but the skirt is lovely. It sometimes does a weird crinkle at my hips. You can actually notice it in my pic. The zipper is on the back so I'm not sure why the crinkle happens.Overall, it's a bright and beautiful dress. I just really despise the see-through factor.

Better than expected! I did Amazon try before you buy for my daughters wedding. I ended up choosing another Adrianna Papell dress only due to color. This dress was heavy and high quality! Very comfortable and a braw wasn’t needed. Tho I’m sure a strapless could be worn, or backless sticky push-up even. I ordered champagne color with gold sequins and the color I received seemed a little darker. Which actually was even prettier! It fit perfectly except for too long. My measurements are: bust 35, waist 27, hips 38, height 5’2, weight 125.

Perfect color and length! I did go a size up and it’s snug but fits well enough. I’m 6’1” and the length is perfect. This is outta the bag wrinkled but wanted to show fabric and color. It’s a thin satin, which for me is just fine. The color is rich and beautiful.

Gorgeous! I did have difficulty fitting due to bust size. I am 39" at the bust (36C), 150lb, 5'3". I needed an XL - which is what their size chart says. My suggested fit on Amazon was way off. There are complaints that the sequins catch. Yes, they do! You'll want to check yourself each time you stand up or smooth yourself down. It's not a big deal! I did have to watch out for the sleeves, as you might accidentally dip them into something. One thing I didn't like was that this dress zips the length of the back. The zipper does not have a tiny hole in which you could put a safety pin & ribbon to assist you in zipping up. It was a bit of a struggle. I got so many compliments! You will be focused on your dress the entire time, tho, due to the sequins catching & the sleeves. It's just too pretty to pass up, tho!

Amazing dress!!! I did have to have the dress altered slightly around the chest area because I am small chested (36 B) for my height/weight (5’5, 175.) The fabric was decently forgiving, but I wore a medieval shapewear torture device underneath, just to be sure everything was kept in place. The Kelly green color is such an easy transitional spring/summer color and the one-shoulder design ensured I didn’t get too hot. Buy this dress!!

Gorgeous Color & Super Flattering!! I didn't have much time to find a dress for my friend's summer wedding and this was the first thing I saw. After reading reviews and looking at pictures, I was undecided on what size to order because I always fall into the in-between category for a small or medium, so I ended up purchasing a small and medium dress. When they arrived, I was honestly shocked at how good the quality was. It wasn't a super thin material and wasn't see-through at all which I was nervous about because there was no liner in it. The medium ran a little big on me in the waist and was a little longer on me surprisingly. However, the small dress was definitely tighter on me in the butt but I still had room to dance and maneuver just fine without worrying about it ripping. I got so many compliments on this dress and it's definitely a perfect summer wedding guest dress especially here in Texas with the heat. I cannot recommend this dress enough it was just so pretty and had such a rich color. My only complaint (which is my fault) is that my sports bra was showing at the top a little bit but that's because I don't own a real bra or even know what type of bra to wear with this and I'm not a fan of the sticky petals so that's on me! just make sure to give it a little steam or run it through the washer and hang dry it so that the creases come out! :) For reference, I'm 5'10 & 150lbs if this helps anyone

Exactly as a majority of reviews said. Gorgeous. I don't like buying clothes online, but I had a wedding to attend and realized I needed a dress on short notice. I couldn't find the one I had intended on wearing, and everything else I had was black or a bit too formal. I don't have a lot of "spare" cash, so I can't just pop into a major-brand retail store and pick something nice. This purchase was a surprisingly good decision that stayed within my budget. I'm not someone who does a lot of dressing up. I don't feel comfortable in fancy clothing most of the time, and special occasions are pretty much the only time you will find me in a dress. I'm 5'3 and 150ish lb with average endowments. I chose the size based on the reviews I read. The medium size dress was just a touch snug through the waist, but it was quite flattering. It is a little stretchy everywhere but the "belt" ribbon, so it gave as needed to keep me comfortable. I needed a second person to zip it up, and at first I wasn't aware that the zipper does unzip past the "belt" material. The material was exactly the color I ordered, which was a vibrant forest green I saw on the site. I am usually a blue color person, but that green is really nice! I intend to order a medium in the blue when they get them back in stock on the style I liked, but I ordered the green first on purpose. The lace on top is soft, not scratchy at all, the fabric of the outer skirt flows well, and the inner skirt is around knee length for good privacy coverage. If you don't like this style, search the Miusol brand. There are plenty more to choose from. I was tempted by several, but the ruffled v skirt looked like it would allow me to move well. It was excellent for dancing. I also chose this particular style because the reviews for most of the dresses by this brand said the skirt ran long for the person's height (even tall people). I didn't have time or a sewing machine to alter it, so I chose to trail gracefully in the back, and keep my front steps free as well as show off my shiny bling shoes. It was a good decision. The skirt was a touch long for me, but since it was only long in the back, I was able to pull it off as an intentional design, not an "oops, I couldn't alter it in time" faux-pas with me tripping every other step. One more note. It is machine wash cold with like colors and line dry. It does need a touch of ironing for the skirt but it looks great even with a couple of wrinkles. Do I recommend? DEFINITELY. Worth. Every. Penny.

Stunning! I felt like a million bucks in this dress! I wore it to a red carpet event and got compliments from all the ladies who purchased their dresses from expensive dress shops! I’m 5’3” so it was a bit longer in the back and got stepped on a few times, but I just treated it like it was a dress with a long train and picked up the back when I walked around. The bodice is gold and silver sequins. I chose gold earrings and gold shoes, but silver would have been a great choice too! My tummy is not flat (I’m about 6 months postpartum) and the way this dress sits on the ribs and flairs out with the skirt totally camouflaged the way my belly sticks out. The dress came a little wrinkled, but I just used an iron on medium heat and turned the skirt inside out before ironing. It worked beautifully! Now I just need to find another event to give me a reason to wear it again! Great value for the cost. The zipper wasn’t one of those tiny fragile ones that gets stuck all the time. I felt that it was well made and fit well which was a huge relief since you never quite know with online purchases.
Buy it already. I felt like a princess. It’s made well, fit great and I got so many compliments. I’m about 5’7 and wore 3.5/4 inch heals and it was just the right length.

Excellent Fit. I felt very comfortable in this dress. I wear a size 42 DD bra, and my belly doesn't seem to be getting much smaller. But this dress was very flattering. I am 5'7" and with a low pair of heels, the length was perfect. The only thing I would say is like all the other reviews mention, there are in fact there is a slit on both sides of the dress. Too half too big but beautiful dress! I find plus sized version always come at a cost of awkward fitting in areas. This dress is beautiful and fits fantastic except for the shoulders. One is perfect and Another one is too big.. I first bought the white and blue dress by Bell Poque, and I LOVED it! The style, the length, the colors and patterns, everything was fantastic. So when I got a notification about their another dress had a deal, I immediately placed an order. I got the blue-yellow floral this time because I thought the combination of those colors is so unique and fun. When I tried it on, the fit felt different, especially the chest area. It felt bigger and I didn’t feel comfortable bending over to pick up something in it. So I compared it with my first dress, and it turned out that the chest area for this blue-yellow dress was about 2” bigger, as you can see in my photos. Ugh… I’m not sure why the same size differs this much, but I was absolutely heartbroken because I LOVE the dress! But it’s going to cost about the same to take it to the alterations, so I returned the second dress. I'm super disappointed. By the way, I’m 5/6” and about 160 lb, usually wear XL for most of the clothes, including dresses like those. The first one fits me perfectly, but not the second one. Oh, my bra size is 38C if that helps. The first white dress - 10 stars! This (second) blue-yellow dress - 2 stars...

Over all happy but be aware of which material you choose! I first bought this dress in the pink with black spots pattern and was very satisfied. The dress met my expectations, especially for the price. The color was vibrate and I received many complements on the style. I ordered a small which fit overall but I thought it was a little tight in some spots. I'm just over 5'10" and the dress fell near my knees. I was so satisfied with this dress that I later bought it in green. This time I got a medium. The medium ended up feeling to big but I was able to adjust it to some degree with the laces in the back. My number one critique for this dress would be to watch out for which pattern you choose. The materials are not the same. The green dress wrinkled very badly which is why I rated this dress a 4 instead of a 5. I did not seem to have this problem with the pink one.

I ordered the XS and I am 5'10, 118 lbs, 32-25-34 for reference.
