Eye-Catching and Comfortable Pantsuit I generally prefer single-breasted jackets since double-breasted jackets look good primarily on those 5'10" or taller, and I have suits but only cleverly designed black skirt-suits for work -- yet no full-on pantsuit. Now I do, and is it ever eye-catching and comfortable! Nicely lined, this red pantsuit in a Large fit my size 14 body well, and I appreciated the stretch in the waistband in the back for bending and stretching. The button and zip-front to the pants makes for a polished look from the front, too. I tried it with one button buttoned, both buttons buttoned, and then no buttons buttoned, and all three ways worked to look good. The length of the sleeves and the pants work well. The lining in the jacket is very nice, but overall the suit is not so heavy as are my other suits, so this pantsuit could be used in warmer weather than my skirt-suits actually. I was surprised to read that the pantsuit was supposedly able to be washed rather than dry cleaned, especially with the jacket being lined, but the tag did mention that it also could be dry cleaned, the option I'll probably use for the jacket at the least. Having pockets in both the jacket and the pants means that I could potentially not even need to carry a purse sometimes, too, depending on what I need to bring with me from my office for meetings and the like. I'm delighted with this product and pleased that it's lightweight enough that I could likely pack it for conventions out of state also if I didn't choose to wear it on the plane -- it's that comfortable, really, that I could even think about wearing it on a plane! In red, it's particularly eye-catching, but I have so much black in my wardrobe, I thought why not go big with this choice? And I'm glad I did! I heartily recommend this pantsuit!

Stunning on my full figured body I get compliments every single time I wear this dress. I was told I looked like sex on a stick in this dress. I absolutely love it and it feels like pajamas to wear. You should get this dress. My only complaint. I am 5'0 and so I had to cut off about 7 inches and hem it and it's still floor length on me. My sewing machine HATED this fabric. It could not sew through the fabric with out getting jammed. I think the weave in the knit is so very tight. But the good news on that is that the fabric feels silky and soft. I had to take it to my elderly neighbor lady's house who has a better machine than me. It jammed on her machine too until she got out her specialty needle for knits. Then we got through the hem. It still wasn't easy, but it finally did work. Love this dress and I have it in two different colors. Only the green was a bear to hem though.

Great purchase! Compliments consistently!! I get so many compliments on this dress! I bought the green. The background really is a kelly or grass green which the picture might not show. It’s very pretty (and I am not generally a “green” person.) I am 5’ 4” and weigh 135 lbs and bought a size small. It fits very well. The one shoulder tie is unique which I liked. You need to play with how tight, or loose, to tie it for the look you want. The top part will be “billowy” but in a good way I found. The fabric is very light and breathable! Perfect on a hot summer day. You can dress it up or wear it for a casual day out. I have worn it to an afternoon September garden wedding as well as an evening in Disney Springs getting dinner and drinks. It washes well and needs no ironing … even after being packed in my suitcase. Highly recommend!!

Weird neckline I got a 2XL. 5' 8" 198lbs. Hello all. I'm writing this review to help you decide. First I am 6 months post partum and not breastfeeding. I went down naturally to 198, I gained weight, and now I'm back to 198. I don't have an hour glass figure and have a wide waist naturally. For the picture I am not wearing a control top, which I probably will get a control top with shorts for the dresses. I am wearing a molded (padded) underwire bra. I washed the clothes on cold delicate cycle and dried on delicate cycle, then I ironed/steamed them. I am writing multiple reviews for clothes I bought for prime day so this part is the informational section I am putting on all the reviews. I measure around 43"over bust-36" narrowest part of waist-46"widest part of hips. This dress is almost great but if you look at the model, it's made to show your bra straps which isn't that great in a business setting. There is also too much neckline so that the material comes off my skin. I'm not sure if this would be fixed if I had bought a smaller size. For the price I got it for, I'll just fix these problems by wearing a business blazer. Dress is soft and thick stretchy material, it would probably look way better with a control top or -20lbs :)

high quality, floofiest of dresses I got a size 6 in black, and the bust is way too big, but honestly even if I didn't get it tailored to fit, you don't really notice how big the bust is on me (see pictures). My bust is 85 cm, my nat waist is 71 cm, and my hips are at 81 cm (hips don't matter - A-line dress). I'm 5'6 and in ~2.5 inch heels, the dress hit exactly where it should. Fit me super well for a dress not literally made for my body. Truly as close to the original picture as you can expect. Wonderful, thick quality, well-sewn. The back has a wonderful set of buttons, but a slight note, the buttons have white string to pull them closed which stands out on the black fabric (not really good or bad, but something). I'm giving it 5 stars even though it had a slight problem (see below) because honestly you could not get a better quality dress for the price. There is a built-in bra, which holds the boning up wonderfully. It does not slip! There are even pockets big enough to hold an iphone plus. The slit is perfect, and there is a natural floof to it, so I don't need to get a bustle like I was worried about. It trails behind you when you walk. Understated but gorgeous. Edit: 4 stars because I sewed each button on myself to make sure it would fall off (was held on by a thread). And a button did fall off when I pulled it out, but I'm getting it tailored so I'll probably have them fix it. Kind of a bummer because its super noticeable but I also might be able to super glue it back on.

Almost perfect I got a small, black, I’m 4’11 and 155lbs. (For my weight I believe I should be a medium, but Im losing weight so I wanted something I could wear in the future). I did not use the tie that came with it. Wore with gold sandals with slight heel. *This is my first amazon dress purchase. Pro:This is a sexy casual dress, perfect for when you dont know the how everyone else is dressing but you wanna look good. Comfortable all night. Like the elastic bands on the sleeves so you could wear long or push up above elbows if you got hot. Neg: Upper half was a little big, had to take a piece behind me neck and tieoff with a thin scrunchie(or safety pin would of worked). Right under my boobs is was tight and the zipper almost didnt zip up but we got it. Parts are short so you have to pay attention to what your doing or dont wear on a windy day. Personally, I think it looks a little better on thinner people because I think it made me look a little pregnant/have a big belly. Would buy again and try in a different color.

Perfect dress for my small wedding I got married in this beautiful dress. I was surprised by just how lovely this dress is. I needed to get something beautiful but not white because white is not a great color for me. When it arrived, I immediately tried it on and it fit me beautifully in a size 12. It is lined and it does not cling. It is also lightweight and very very comfortable. The material goes with you as you move. I am tall (5’ 8”) and this dress is long, so be aware if you buy it and you are shorter, you will need to get it hemmed. Everyone loved this dress at the wedding. I liked it so much that I’m ordering the burgundy one for my niece’s wedding in October. One more thing, you might want to get the dress steamed out because when you take it out of the packaging it will be wrinkled.

It is a bit big in the chest area, so I kept having to pull it up and down in the back, but nothing double sided tape can’t fix next time. Also, the neckline is wide, so you will need a square neck bra or strapless as mine was quite visible on the sides. Furthermore, the zipper does seem fragile, but I was able to get it up and down numerous times by myself. Overall, I love this dress and it was a wonderful purchase

This dress is everything I got so many compliments on this dress! It’s a very comfortable stretchy material, so even being in my 2nd trimester it was very flattering and supper comfortable. Perfect fit I got so many compliments on this dress! It’s was perfect for the Gala! I ordered a size small. I’m 5’2/126lbs.
I love this dress! I got so many compliments on this dress. I am 5'1" and the length is just right for me.

Perfect for 50's party I got so many compliments on this dress. I did buy a petticoat to wear underneath to make it flair a bit. The material is very nice and has a little stretch to it. I am 5'4 160 pounds with large breasts ( 36D). I got a large but could have used a medium.
Perfect! I got so many compliments on this dress. I ordered a large. I’m a 38DD, 5’4 and 150 lbs. The dress was too long so I cut off to tea length It’s very comfortable and the color was great!

Very flattering style and color I got so many compliments on this dress. I was worried about the top with the overlapping, but I was covered completely and it stayed in place. The material was comfortable and flowy. I loved the lace sleeves. Dress was perfect. I’m 5’8 187lbs.and have a pear shaped body. Absolutely gorgeous I got so many compliments on this dress. It was extremely comfortable and so gorgeous. A beautiful coppery brown. Melania dress I got so many compliments on this Melania-style dress at my sister's wedding. (I have never had luck buying dresses on Amazon so I was really pleasantly surprised!) LOVED IT! I got so many compliments walking into a Christmas party at work wearing this dress. Perfect Special Event Dress I got so many compliments wearing this dress to a December wedding! The material like chiffon like, not see through (for the color I got), and the stretch is pretty average (just enough room to eat dessert). I am 180 pounds, 5'2", and an apple body shape.

Simple but looks great I got so many compliments when I wore this dress and it was very comfortable! I had to hem it a tiny bit because I am only 5'1". Bit the way it is made, it was an easy hem to make.

Very pleased. I got the black XL. I'm 5'9, 38D. It is wonderfully slimming. It fits great, no underarm gap, fits well above and across the bust and waist, just right in the waist and hips, and perfect length. It washed well in cold water on delicate and is now hanging to air dry. I say it fits great but it was kind of blah and unbecoming until I put a 2" wide black elastic belt with it, and that did the trick. Got a great set of belts on Amazon (JASGOOD Women Stretchy Belt for Dresses Vintage Elastic Wide Waist Belt,Suit for Waist Size 42-47 Inches, A-Black+Brown+Beige+Red(4 PCS) for a really good price. Any of those 4 colors of belts, except the beige one, will look great with this dress. Light colored belts to me do not look good on larger women. This dress seems to be well-made. It's a strange synthetic fabric but is lightweight, and the ruffle at the bottom is such a nice touch and makes the skirt move and flow gracefully when walking. I normally don't like ties dangling on my arms or back, but I like this dress so much that I may learn to cope with that, or maybe sew the shoulder tie to make it simply a shoulder strap.

Elegant Sparkles and Design, Beautiful Gown I got the blush gold color for a Christmas Concert. I absolutely love this gown. I’m 5’ 5” (5’ 4.5” to be exact) and 133 lbs and I got it in size 2, size I normally wear from Adriana Papelle and it fit very well and very comfortable, plenty of room. I made the right decision by not sizing up. The only alteration was for length, half inch of outer material and 1” from lining. I read the reviews about the beading. My dress came in all beads intact but it did loose a few beads of a row in the back in the process of dry cleaning and trying on, I can’t say when. The gown came with extra beads and I fixed the one row in the back and reinforced a few that were loose. Totally worth it, the gown is delightful, just loved it, a total vision.

Long enough for a tunic, dressy enough for a date I got the light coffee blouse, and it is a pretty "latte" color. Very shiny and elegant. Feels good and is light-weight. This will be perfect for summer. I think it looks good with leggings as well as dress pants. It's appropriate for work, but can still take you out to dinner. I'm 5'2" and 110 lbs. The small is just right for a tunic-style top. Not too tight but not overly big either. The picture was taken right out of the package. I'm letting it hang so the wrinkles come out.

Pretty good for $35! I got the medium size, im 5'4" and ~140 lbs and it fit pretty well! Has a lot of stretch so I probably could have sized down if i really wanted it to be more of a true body con style dress. I defiantly had to do *small* alterations to the sleeves (made the bottoms tighter and added a few tacks to make them look more "puffy"). Added a belt as I felt it needed something for the somewhat harsh line between the top corset style top and the bottom. Overall it was very easy to make it look high end if youre willing to take the extra 15 minutes to sew the sleeves up a bit. Overall very comfortable and classy looking!

Love it with a petticoat! I got the rainbow one for a dance with the hubby and I loved it! I’m 5’8 175 pounds and went with the xl. I had extra room and could have maybe done a large instead but I prefer a looser fit. Paired it with a hot pink petticoat (Shimaly® Women's 50s Vintage Petticoat 26" Crinoline Rockabilly Tutu Skirt Slip S-3XL) and the length was perfect! I did buy shapewear to wear underneath but because of the fit I ended up not needing it. Wearing again for another dance shortly!

Beautiful dress I got the red and wore it at the Taj Mahal. The material is breathable and you can adjust the skirt to make it modest or to show more skin. I’m 5’1 and the length is perfect for my height.

Beautiful Trail of Bling I got the Rose Gold, size 16 Mother of the Groom dress. I have 36DDD chest and am 5’-9” tall. It fit perfect. It was stunning and I got many compliments. Bride was very happy with the dress. However, everywhere I went I was leaving a trail of sequins. Every room, all over, it was dropping sequins. See attached photo; the flower has four petals and one of the petals has lost the sequins after only wearing one time. Everyone could tell where I sat to watch the ceremony, or where I paused to get snacks, etc. Good thing I was only using it for one wedding; if I wore it for another couple of days it would start to look really rough with missing sequins. This is beautiful but probably a one-time wear dress.

I got the royal blue in small. I. 4ft11 & 140lbs. This dress is cute & comfortable. Not see through but not super thick either. It flows well in a spin & molds to my body just enough to not make me look overweight as I am. The only thing missing is pockets but I won't hold that against anyone. I felt cuter than I've felt since my January surgery & it's August.

Very flattering! I got the rust floral color in medium. I was concerned it might look too much like a sexy bedtime nightgown, but it's actually very elegant for event attire. I struggled most with the neckline, which seemed to just rest awkward. My small 34B chest does nothing to fill in. Surprisingly, the awkward neckline doesn't show in photos. It was the first thing my hubby noticed, though. I think I'd need tape to get the neck to rest and stay in an appropriate position. (I'm a tomboy. I have no idea how to arrange the neck. LOL. But the dress makes me look elegant!) The straps are adjustable, which helps a lot. (I'm 5'7", 125 lbs with very wide shoulders.) If you have broad shoulders and/or a pronounced collarbone, this dress will make your top flattering regardless of chest size. (There is plenty of extra fabric for larger busts.) Get some boob tape to add lift and guard your nips. You cannot see through the rust color, so wear whatever panties you like. (I recommend the Under Armour "UA Pure Stretch" hipster panties for seamless comfort.) This fabric does NOT stretch, so I got the medium. There is a side zipper, but I didn't need to use it. A small would technically fit, but I think the looser fit of the medium is more sexy (and comfortable) with how the fabric gently drapes. Although I got a fall color, I think it's more of a late summer dress. It's almost like wearing nothing, so you'd need a long, warm jacket to attempt this in colder weather. I would totally consider this dress in more colors.

Go by the size chart. Outstanding dress! I got the size 18 because my bust is 45 inches even though the recommended size was 16. It fits perfectly. Not at all tight making me look very slim. I made the right choice when buying this dress I got the small and I’m 5 feet 120 pounds it was a little too long for me so I had to have it hemmed and taken in a little bit so it was above my knee did not look nice below my knee problem because I’m short. Curves Needed I got the value for my money. These fit very high waisted and I love it! I have thicker thighs, small butt and a bit of loose skin in my belly area from slow weight loss. I am a 6 in LULU pants but with these I ordered a large to have a loose business casual pair of pants. The quality is heavy , fresh material and hangs just right. I am 5’6” and when putting the pants at my waist they almost touch the floor. I was so excited when I tried them on, they look great on me and I have so many shirt I can pair with this grey! Beautiful! Exactly as pictured. I got this as a Latter-day Saint temple dress. Great price for such a nice dress! The material is good quality and hangs nicely. It has kind of a stretchy, smooth, nylon-y feel, which is relatively heavy. I haven't worn it around much, but I anticipate the fabric will be at least somewhat wrinkle resistant. Comfortable. The fit is perfect. For reference, I'm about 5'8 and 120 lbs, and I got a SMALL (I'm not sure why Amazon is saying I got an X-large--that's not correct). So happy to find a dress that's actually long enough! I didn't notice the side zipper at first, which made it unnecessarily difficult to get on. But with the zipper, it's very easy. No more difficult back zippers from my previous temple dresses! Keep in mind that this dress is not lined. The material is decently thick, so it's certainly not transparent, but you'll still probably need a slip underneath to mask underwear lines. The only real downside to this dress is NO POCKETS. so keep that in mind if you're using this as a temple dress like me (thankfully, I have a pocket in my slip).

Beautiful dress for the price I got this dress for an upcoming cruise and am really looking forward to wearing it. I was concerned that it would be too long (I'm 5'2") but with low heels, it works nicely. It might be short on taller folks but the tulip/wrapped hem would allow some flexibility.The fabric is polyester but is soft and flows well. I had seen an up close picture in another review and was concerned about the hem and the stitching on the finished edges being untidy but my dress does not have any of those issues. Another comment from a review mentioned the plastic snap on the bodice, which is an issue for me. After initially opening the snap, it will not stay closed. For me, it is not a problem because the placement of the snap does not work for me and I will be moving it or devising a different closure.A nice feature of this dress is that it has an underskirt. The main skirt does not seem sheer (maybe it is for the lighter colors?), I like that the under skirt is there to a) help with draping of the dress and b) make me feel more secure about not exposing too much should the dress fall open. The dress comes with a tie closure and side loops to keep it in place. There are some loose threads on the dress but I can easily clean those up.At $31, this is a great value for a semi-formal/formal dress.

Very Sexy Dress, But... I got this dress for my bachelorette party. I was so excited to receive it but was skeptical it would fit right because of my build. I have a very small chest and wide hips (Thanks to my kids). According to the sizing chart, I was a small in my chest area and a large in the hip region. I weighed my options and bought a size small. I tried it on as soon as I got it and it was pretty tricky to get around my hips without busting the seam, but once I got it on, it fit well.. but not the best. I saw a review that said the dress rode up when they walked, and let me tell you, that is true for me as well. Even though I got a size small, it still looked a little too large in the chest for the size I am. In my opinion, they should have built in cups in this dress. In my photo, I had added some removable cups in there so you wouldn't be able to see right through it. The zipper was extremely hard to move by myself. It seems like it gets stuck in all the sequins so I had to get help from my husband. All in all, this dress is gorgeous. Just my type of build that makes things a little tricky. So gorgeous! I got this dress in the color BURGUNDY in a size 12. For sizing reference, I'm usually a medium-large on top and am currently either a 36E/36F. In bottoms, I'm usually a medium-large or a 8-12/29-31 in pants/jeans, and if it helps, I wear a size 6 or 8 in Lulu leggings. I'm 5'3" tall with a short torso, and my measurements are about 44"-33"-44" (bust-waist-hip) right now, give or take. I've been on the hunt for a dress to wear to an upcoming work holiday party and this is the second one I tried. It's a little more on the formal end of things, but not so much so that you couldn't wear it for a more casual event. I'm so glad I read the reviews and went with my usual size 12, because it fits me absolutely perfectly. I'd definitely consider this TTS. This does have a stretchy back panel to it that's hard to see in the product photos and in mine, but it spans from about the top of the back to the top of the waistband (hiding under the fluttery top in my back pic). Thanks to that, it does make that area of the dress forgiving, but the rest of it has no stretch, so keep that in mind. I'm not wearing a bra in the pics but it was supportive enough that I didn't feel the need to. The fit is so cute. I've tried other dresses with a similar shape (like that Show Me Your Mumu dress everyone loved years ago, with the fluttery top area) but they didn't hug the waist like this, so they weren't as flattering. I love that this one has that gathered material around the waist because it actually gives some definition, but it's also not tight on the tummy... It's the perfect fit, seriously. It's been a long time since I've tried a piece of clothing on and felt this beautiful. I still say that I kind of wish the fluttery part around the bust was a little shorter, as I already have a bigger bust and it just makes it look bulkier, but I can get past that. I really appreciate that you can wear the sleeves on or off the shoulder. Obviously it's intended to wear off, but they're stretchy enough that you can do either. The slit is a really nice length and hits me about mid-thigh, so nothing racy. I'm on the shorter side and had lots of extra length at the bottom, so I would need to wear heels, so that's good for the taller girls. Also, I have slightly thicker arms and didn't have any issues with the sleeves cutting into them. The material (top/outer layer) feels sort of like chiffon, as it's light and fluttery and very prone to static. I was moving it around to position the sleeve layers and the skirt and they kept clinging to my skin, so I would maybe recommend some static guard if it's doing that to you as well. I would also say to bring a steamer with you if you're traveling with it, as that fluttery layer tends to wrinkle, as you can see in my pics. Overall, this is such a stunning dress and I highly recommend. It looks great on so many different body types and is flattering while still being comfortable.

Nicely made, conservative dress I got this dress in the pink and the color was accurate to the website. The sewing is good quality, straight, soft material, doesn’t really need to be ironed. It has a satin-y built in liner, which is nice. I’m able to put the dress on without unbuttoning the button at the neck. Top ruching is stretchy. I’m 5’8” 165 lbs, got the Large, and the dress doesn’t seem too short. It is very conservative with the high neck and back, and the sleeves are a bit puffy. This is good quality but after trying it on, it’s not really my style and I’m not sure I’ll wear it much. Aside from the style of the dress, this is good quality and a solid choice.

Size down if you’re inbetween 🤔 I got this dress in two sizes small (1st pics) and medium (2nd pics) I am 138 lbs 5’5. I normally wear mediums to larges in most dresses. I ended up fitting much better in the small and didn’t have the problem of my shoulders falling down so often and the bust fit me much better, I think it’s meant to just be tight fitting. I have bigger arms and both gave me ample room in the arm and the pleating around the stomach is very flattering for those of us with a little belly. The material has a lot of give and it’s a very nice weight, the design is cute. If you’re having issues with the lining poking out and the bust dropping too low you can fix it with some iron on hemming tape and a small stay stitch at the desired place for the bust or if you don’t like sewing you could use some garment tape. Super cute I’ll be getting more from them soon! 🙂

I got this women's V-neck 3/4 sleeve chiffon blouse by Timeson to go with my favorite party pants to dress them up for an upcoming trip. I ordered size large, and I am 5'3" and 135 lbs. I enjoy a looser fit, and I feel it fits me perfectly for a tunic top with chiffon fabric so it can be a little flowy. It is thin and lightweight but you can't see through it at all - it is very modest. The fabric is soft, and the body of the top is lined with a soft nylon-like fabric which is very comfy. My mom who is a fabric artist says this kind of fabric may be susceptible to picking, so I will use it for dressy occasions on the trip before wearing it to work as my workplace is hard on clothes. I do not know yet how sturdy it is and I do not want to test that out and risk ruining this beautiful top. It is 22" across at the front of the bust (44" all the way around), 22" from neck to the end of the sleeve, 28" straight down from shoulder to hem, 23" across at hem (46" all the way around). It comes in different colors, so choose the one that's best for you and your wardrobe. I'm happy with the navy blue because it looks nice with my pants, but I can see ordering this versatile top in various colors. I like it very much so far and it will be comfortable to wear while still looking nice!

I got this women's V-neck 3/4 sleeve chiffon blouse by Timeson to go with my favorite party pants to dress them up for an upcoming trip. I ordered size large, and I am 5'3" and 135 lbs. I enjoy a looser fit, and I feel it fits me perfectly for a tunic top with chiffon fabric so it can be a little flowy. It is thin and lightweight but you can't see through it at all - it is very modest. The fabric is soft, and the body of the top is lined with a soft nylon-like fabric which is very comfy. My mom who is a fabric artist says this kind of fabric may be susceptible to picking, so I will use it for dressy occasions on the trip before wearing it to work as my workplace is hard on clothes. I do not know yet how sturdy it is and I do not want to test that out and risk ruining this beautiful top. It is 22" across at the front of the bust (44" all the way around), 22" from neck to the end of the sleeve, 28" straight down from shoulder to hem, 23" across at hem (46" all the way around). It comes in different colors, so choose the one that's best for you and your wardrobe. I'm happy with the navy blue because it looks nice with my pants, but I can see ordering this versatile top in various colors. I like it very much so far and it will be comfortable to wear while still looking nice!

Comfortable and stylish for price I had a special event with a specific color palette to match. This teal color worked beautifully for the gala! Very comfortable and flattering fit. Material is stretchier than expected and more sheer, but overall a nice dress I had a very short deadline to have a white dress. I chose this one, but as stated before, the material was far more sheer and see through than I hoped. You will definitely need some kind of shift or camisole underneath as this material leaves nothing to the imagination. Even just wearing a white bra and panties is very visible. I'll never understand why retailers make such sheer material for things that aren't lingerie. For better or worse, the material was also stretchier and had plenty of give. I ordered a Large (12-14) since my measurements were bust36-waist31-hips40 but honestly the Medium would have been a better fit. I wish I had researched a bit more, but what can you do. It's pros are that it is a lovely design and comfortable to wear. If you want a long train this dress will have it (I'm 5'4 and it has so much on the floor I must pick it up to walk appropriately). Hope this was for future buyers.

Flattering and affordable I had a wedding I knew about for quite some time but completely forgot to order a dress for it! I found one I loved on another site but it wasn’t going to get to me in time. I had to venture on to my next best option of Prime delivery on Amazon! Now on to what you actually care about: -Great fit! Because it’s a wrap dress, you can make it fit comfortably. I tried to pull over more for the chest but wasn’t successful. If you are hoping to be more reserved, you’ll need to find a way to close the top a bit more. -Great length for me. Im 5’4” and it just hit the floor in the back with heels. Sorry, didn’t take a full length picture! -Nice material. It isn’t the softest but great for the price. There is a weird slit where the tie comes out that seems bigger than needed and some skin shows but it isn’t noticeable at all. It was definitely a dress worth the cost!

Nervous order I had a wedding to go to and my husband was wearing a blue suit so I was trying to find a blue dress to wear. There was not a single store in town that had dresses so I had to order from here, I was extremely nervous since my timeline was short. I am 5'7 and 141#, this dress fit me like a dream! The only complaint I had is that I couldn't get the wrinkles to come out from being shipped in the bag. I tried a wrinkle release spray, steamer, hanging it in the bathroom while someone showers... nothing worked. The wrinkles were not that noticable once you put it on because of how the dress laid on you, but it was just annoying knowing I couldn't get it out. I was just shocked to know this dress actually looked as good in person as it did in the picture on Amazon lol

So comfortable!!! I had a wedding. I’m 5’5”, 204lbs. My bust is 38 DD. It was a little small in the bust so it gapped. I loved the dress, super comfortable! Love the color! fabric and smell was fine. Quality was good. It almost covered my sandals. Loved the sleeves.

Gorgeous last-minute dress I had an event for which I needed a dress but nothing I had fit, and I’m petite (5’2”) so it’s hard to buy things off the rack. It camouflaged my tummy and hips. I had been eyeing this dress for a while & finally ordered it for my baby shower. Let’s just say I need every color! Perfect length (I’m 5’4) & SO COMFY!

Not the right proportions for me I had high hopes for this dress, but the proportions are not meant for my body shape. I ordered an XL based on the sizing recommendations. As a reference, I'm 5'2", 155 pounds. The top is too big, especially the shoulders, and the bottom is much too tight. Even with shaperwear, I had to squeeze in, and the result was not flattering. The only way this would fit properly would be if I lost 15 pounds on the bottom half of my body and transferred it to my upper half. The dress itself, aside from the sizing, is very pretty. The ruffles are feminine, and the two gold circles at the waist add a stylish touch. I'd recommend this for ladies with a bigger bust and smaller hips. I'm hippier than I am busty, so it just didn't work for me. Too bad, it's a really cute dress. P.S. Please disregard the streaky mirror!

Not the dress for me I had high hopes for this dress, but unfortunately, it just didn’t work for me. As someone on the bigger/curvier side and only 5’2”, I think this dress might be better suited for someone taller and skinner. I ordered an XL, but the zipper wouldn’t go all the way up for me. I ended up tucking in the unzipped portion on my back and tying the top part, which wasn’t ideal. The sizing felt off; while it wasn’t big enough in the torso, it was surprisingly loose around the bust. I had to really tighten the shoulder straps and the tie-back bow to get a somewhat decent fit. If the fit was the only issue, I would have deducted just one star, but I also found the fabric and construction to be subpar, especially considering the price. The fabric is very thin and has a rough texture, even after washing, which was disappointing. Overall, I wouldn’t recommend this dress for anyone with a similar body type or for those looking for a higher-quality fabric. It’s a shame because the design had potential, but it fell short in execution.

AMAZING dress I had my doubts about ordering a dress for a wedding online but this dress exceeded my expectations!! Great quality, especially for the price! Fit perfectly and true to size! S vs M Comparison I had my eye on this dress for over a year, and finally purchased it, first in the Small, but found it was a bit tight, so when I raised my arms the fabric bunched up around my waist and had to be pulled back down. So I next purchased the same dress in Medium. It was surprising to find each made of different fabric! Though still 100% polyester. Fabric in the Small is lighter weight, and the pattern more muted. The Medium is pretty stretchy, horizontally, while the Small has very little stretch. The Small weighs 11.9 oz vs 18.9 oz for the Medium. The Medium is more comfortable, but not as form fitting on top, and though being more stretchy is nice, I don't like the pattern or look of the fabric as much. In the pics I tried to show a comparison of the two, alternating between Small and Medium. For reference, I am 5'2", 125 lbs, and have a pear shape. Sadly, the dresses rather accentuate my wide hips. I can zip each up okay, but each tends to hang up on the thicker layers at the waist.

Great dress, comfortable, flowy and very flattering. Great for pear shaped mama's I had my eye on this print in a different brand but couldn't justify spending $80 on it, plus I wouldn't get it in time for the wedding I needed it for. Ordered the forest green/orange floral in medium (165 and 5'6") and it was a close dupe for the more expensive one I wanted. I don't wear dresses often so this was a win win... pretty, cheap cost wise (but well made) and made me feel feminine/pretty again after a 30lb weight gain that I've struggled to get off. It's a bit snug trying to get it off because this material doesn't stretch but overall true to size however if I were bustier I'd have to size up. Being pear shaped this style allowed me to almost size down to fit my top but have plenty of room for my bigger butt/thighs. The lining does cling a bit but some static spray or a smooth short slip would take care of that. I wore compression shorts under it to smooth my bumps and tuck in my belly a bit.

A Real Stunner! I had my finger crossed on this one- and I had my doubts. No need! The lace is substantial but soft to the touch, the fit is perfect, and the red color could not be more flattering. I bought this dress for my dance club's annual Holiday Ball, which is a semi formal/formal event, so I needed a gown or a really nice cocktail dress. I cannot wait to wear this thing. I have red dance heels, and as luck would have it, they are the identical same color. Fit: I was worried because you cannot really be sure when you buy online. I bought the S because I am normally a size 4 or S in stores. For reference, I am 5'5" tall, 122 lbs, 35-29-37. This dress fits perfectly and clings just right in all the right places. It has enough stretch to be both comfortable and sexy without being too big anywhere. It falls to right at the top of the knee. The cap sleeve adds a bit of modesty to my aging arms (I am almost 73). I could not be more pleased and I expect to dance the night away and have a wonderful evening!

Nice fit and comfortable I had purchased this blouse to wear for easter. I am a 2x and 5'9". It fits well and is really pretty. I love that it is lightweight and the length of the sleeves. I only wish it was a bit longer... but on someone who is not as busy it would be.

Just buy it! I had read reviews about it being “slimming” and I was actually shocked on how much it actually did snatch me up. The material is good quality and thick. And I ordered a xxl and it still a bit lose to where it was comfortable to dance and sit and eat 🥰 I paired it with a faux fur shawl and I really looked so fabulous that night!! Such a win ❤️

Disappointed in weird fit at the chest I had such high hopes for this dress. In the pictures it looks like my perfect satin dress, and it even looks and feels nice off of me, but the fit is not good. I got XS, which is the right size for me, but the chest area was loose on me and I had to tighten the straps. I don't know if it's because of this or just because of how the dress was sewn, but it bunched up weirdly under my armpits. From the front it's really not flattering. I'm sad. If the chest/rib area fit me better, I would happily wear it. The sage color is beautiful. But I also think it should be longer. It doesn't even reach my ankles. I'm 5'6" and 115 lb.

Love this, runs large I had such mixed emotions about ordering these sweaters, I purchased the Flaxen, Chocolate & Blue. They all 3 for the same and have the same soft amazing fabric that is stretchy. It’s absolutely deep cut since it’s just the twist. I wish it was a little longer in the center front where it twist though. I always wear high waisted pants though so not a deal breaker for me. The material is so soft and flattering! I ordered the 3 in mediums and my weight fluctuates like crazy so I’m actually debating exchanging one of them for a small. If the threading wasn’t white it wouldn’t matter, but it drives me crazy. See pics.

GET THIS DRESS!! I had this dress in my cart for a few weeks while I debated and read reviews. I’m SO glad I bought it! I currently weigh 202 and am 5 ft 3in with a DD bust- this dress fit and hugged perfectly!! I ordered the XL. The fabric is great and not too heavy. I can’t wait to wear this dress again in January for a wedding! I’d definitely buy this in another color too! In the picture, I have the dark green color that is just perfect for the holiday season!

Absolutely Gorgeous! I had this dress saved in my cart for a good two months before I finally bought it for a wedding this coming fall. I am absolutely in love with the dress - the color is a gorgeous army green, the fabric is light and flowy yet has some stretch to it, and the cut is perfect. I have issues with dresses because I am busty (38D) and wear a size 5/6 pants/jeans, so they are either tight on top or big all around. I ordered a Large, and it fits me perfectly - not tight, just perfect. The shoulder strap scarves that hang down make it so elegant. I cannot wait to dazzle in this dress in October!

Super cute and comfy. I had this for months and never wore it for some reason. I finally put it in for Easter. It’s so cute. It’s thin but not see through. I think a small would’ve fit better but with the tie back you can cinch it pretty well.

I had this one for 7 hours and the seam split my the breast area. I’m a size 32B and had a medium. The fit wasn’t even tight, the sewing was poor quality and it was ripping even when I had it on for 2 hours. I do not recommend this dress.

This material is so soft I had to attend a banquet for my husbands job and I realized I had no formal dresses whatsoever. I needed something to come in quickly and I searched hours for a dress. I’m 5’5” and I was wearing 3 in heels in the photo. The dress barely touched the ground when I was walking.

Quality Dress for Formal Occasions I hate shopping for clothes online because it's so unpredictable what you might get. I specifically wanted to leave a review for this dress to hopefully help other women find a great dress online! I wore this as a wedding guest and got loads of compliments on it. The material is thick (though not heavy) and the fit was great. It was fitted over my bust and waistline while skimming over my belly and thighs. You can't really wear a bra with it, but I just used some removable pads from an old swimsuit. My only (minor) complaints are that the underarm zipper is hard to get up past the seam at the waistline and the hem of the bottom layer of the wrap skirt is noticeable through the top layer (you can see it across my thigh in the photo). I'm 5'5", ~150 lbs, busty, and wore a medium.

Fits great! I have 1 issue with the dress, which I noticed when I first opened the package. There is a glue from the hem right in the center on the top. I almost gave the rating a 3 star due to that. I ordered this for a Gala we are attending in a couple of weeks. I ordered a medium and it fits as expected. I am 5'7" 150lbs 36/28/42.the dress is very comfortable and moves very nicely as you walk. I like the runch look and design of the dress. The color is perfect and exactly what I was looking for. I would say the size chart is accurate. The ruffled bottom hem looks really cute! Once you add some cute heels this is a great dress that will be a winner for events from time to time. At least the glue is in an area no one but myself or husband will notices, but a disappointment in the arrival of the dress. I would get from this brand again. You cannot go to most stores and get a dress of this quality for this price. There were no issues with any other parts of this dress.

It's ok! I have an upcoming formal event to attend so ordered this dress. I am going to return it, but mostly because I feel like I look like a mother of the bride rather than a wedding attendee. It is comfortable! The top lace portion is kind of thick but not scratchy or uncomfortable. There is a weird ripple right where the lace joins in the center of the bust area (see the arrow in my first pic). This might be fixed by ordering one size down? Not sure. Getting the zipper up/down near the transition from skirt to lace bust area is difficult and makes me feel like it may only last a couple of zips. Also the start of the fabric ripple thing on the skirt doesn't look great, almost like it's ripped? I'm not super versed in clothing or anything so this could just be how it's supposed to be, minus the excess string ball that you can see in the pic I posted. I tried to show the liner for the bust in one of the pics, I liked it! It almost looks like a sweetheart neckline under the lace, hard to see in the pics I took b.c. the lighting wasn't great. I purchased the 3XL. I am 5'6" approx 215 lbs and my bra size is 40G. I have never had an issue with a bust being too big, but this one is haha Probably wouldn't be if I sized down? Also, I'm wearing shapewear under the dress to try to help smooth things out. Overall it's not a bad purchase, just doesn't fit what I'm looking for! Hope this helps someone else 😊👍

Beautiful and comfortable I have been eyeing this dress for quite some time and my husband bought it for me for Christmas. (Props to you, babe!) It fits a little larger than I want but if I went down a size I think it would be too tight (I don’t like my clothes too tight) then I’d probably sacrifice some of the length. I’m 5’8” and typically wear size 8 - sometimes a 6 on top; 10 in jeans depending on the fit I’m looking for. Measurements: bust 36.5 (32DD/34D) waist 28 hips 39. I was concerned that the length would be awkward but it hit just at ankle. The surplus top, however is awkward. Though it’s nice to have the option of covering up or opening up. I’m debating on whether I want to alter the arms and sides - as I feel like maybe taking it in would make the top fall into place better.

I have been having difficulty finding clothes lately and on a whim saw this dress and loved seeing the pictures in the reviews. I ordered it and needed it the next day for my boyfriend's birthday dinner. When I received it, I was pleasantly surprised that the weight of the fabric was heavy enough to make the dress hang well and provide enough give in stretchiness. The top of the dress is lined and the skirt is not. I was not worried because the fabric was not sheer enough to see through. I wore a strapless bra and I didn't have any issue with the gap in material.I am about 165 lbs, 5'3", 38C bra size and I ordered a large and it fit perfectly. I wore a jockey antichaffe skimmies underneat to smooth out but I doubt I really needed it...just felt more comfortable.The only difficulty I had was getting the creases out of the skirt from the shipping. I ironed it on light heat, put a wet hand towel in the dryer on low heat and it still didn't get the creases out. I also used Downy Wrinkle spray. I didn't have enough time to dry clean or wash it.Overall, I am very satisfied with the dress for $40 and would recommend and buy in a different color if needed. Pink is usually not my color but my boyfriend commented he loves me in pink so this is what i ordered. Loved that it was next-day delivery.

Buy the pants !!

Lace will snag easily - but such a lovely dress to wear! I have been looking for a dress for a wedding. I am 5'4", about 165 lbs, and pear shaped with a mom pooch. I got the L based on the size chart, as this is not an A line dress so it is best as a pear to size up.Pros: I fell really great in the dress - my pictures don't do it justice, in my opinion. It is so comfortable and easy to wear! I love the lace on the sleeves and skirt below the knee. I love how the cut isn't super boxy, isn't super tight, but still the cut give shape to my rear.Cons: The lace will snag really easily! You will need to be super careful what jewelry you wear. I tried to add a belt, but I really think the lace would snag or rub and pill. This makes me anxious, which is why I dropped a star. I would hand wash this, carefully.

A very flattering dress if you can fill out the top I have been looking for a dress to wear to a wedding. I am 5'4" roughly 165 lbs. I am a pear shape who has had 2 kiddos, so I have my mom pooch. I am wearing a size 12.Pros: The dress does not gape in the chest as it is sewn to the top of the V. It covers my knees. It has sleeves, and arm holes are neither too small or too big. My bra strap is covered in the back. The material is lightweight and comfortable. The fabric is smooth and soft and doesn't feel like it would easily snag. I felt very pretty in this dress. There are 'cups' in the fabric, which help give the dress shape.Cons: I probably should have opted for the size 10, being a pear shape. The top is too big and the shoulders fell off my shoulders. I can't wear this in public at this size. The bodice sits high, which allow the pooch to be hidden in the pleats, but the feeling of the bodice stopping at the bottom of my ribs was a little unusual.Takeaways - if you are a pear shape, you may opt to size down on the sizing chart. If you size up, be aware the top my slide off your shoulders.

Elegant and comfortable I have been looking for a nice dress to wear to our Christmas Eve church service. This dress is perfect. It’s very comfortable and the lace is soft, not itchy. It fits true to size and the fabric is stretchy. It’s a little longer than I prefer (I’m 5’5”), but still a nice length. It would be best worn with a strapless bra or maybe nude. I love it!

Great lightweight warm weather dress for work or formal I have been looking for an everyday low maintenance dress appropriate for warm weather like this for a long time. The material is light and breathable and feels great; especially for polyester. I am 5'7" and the dress falls just to my knees which makes it perfect for work as well as for after hours. Being a US size 14 and upon reading other reviews that the sizing on this dress runs a bit small, I ordered a size up from my usual large and got the XL and couldn't be happier. One criticism of this dress was the material wasn't opaque enough but I ordered the polka dot in black as you can see from the photo and found it to be fine. Would highly recommend!

cute set but shorts did not look good on me I have been seeing this particular style from the 90s coming back over the end of summer. I got this in black and for me, curvy, 5'7", the top fits a bit loosely on my body in a decent way that might pair well with something over it or under. The shorts unfortunately do not do me any favors and I look stocky and wide. I'm glad its machine washable. I haven't washed it yet but it seems promising that it won't shrink given what its made of. I really like that they are nice pieces that can also be worn as separates, so you have lots of ways to work with this 2 piece. I will probably keep the shorts for at home use since they are not flattering.

Buy the dress! I have been wanting this dress from the minute I saw it in an add over a year ago, but that seller wanted over $100 and I was not about to pay that much. This is worth every penny! (Please don't mind the bra strap, my lazy ass was so excited to try it on) The material is way nicer than I expected for the price, it's like soft on the inside! It is long, so I will have to hem it. BUT... I'm crazy shocked at the quality. I'm 5' 2" and 118 lbs. I got a size small based off of other reviews. Fit's like a glove. There is stretch so it's comfy, I'm not used to wearing such fitted things, so I debated sending it back for a medium, but then the one arm sleeve at the shoulder will be too off. And even that being said, I might have to shorten that. I'm going to a high flut'en wedding and I was worried that I would be ok in this dress, it will be PERFECT!

So-So I have bought similar dresses on Amazon that were really flattering. This was awkward through the torso, and not flattering at all. The zipper was sturdy, which isn't always the case, but the stitching wasn't, which is a concern for me in terms of longevity. It was also only lined through the torso area, but not throughout the whole dress. Although it wasn't see through despite no lining past the torso, it compromised a more polished look. The other dresses I have purchased in the past, for a similar price, were fully lined. I gave it three stars for the comfort, color, and length. It can be hard to get this actual length below the knees for us taller people. For reference, I am 6'0 235lbs.

Beautiful Fabric, Nice style, odd flap I have mixed feelings about this dress. On the positive side, it's really cute, form-fitting and very stretchy, and the material feels wonderful. I’m 5’11”, and this dress is long! even with a 4.5 inch heel the dress was still hitting the floor. It is very comfortable to move in though. The stretchy fabric is super soft and comfortable to wear however the dress is not lined other than in the bust area. I love how silky it feels, but it doesn’t provide much support, so shapewear might be in order if you're looking for a smoother silhouette. The chest area is a little odd, the flap of satin at the front feels a bit wide and tends to sit high up, I almost wish it was designed so that it was at the rear of the dress, in fact initially when I put it on that's where it went and it actually looked pretty good. The straps are nicely embroidered but do feel a little thin, so I hope one doesn't snap and I have a wardrobe malfunction! That being said, the design itself is stunning, with its flaws being minor I'd say I'm happy with the dress, just know that it's likely to require alteration at the hem and shapewear to make it work. For 52.99 which is the price at time of my review I feel it offers reasonable value.

Perfect for a night in Riviera Maya I have multiple of these dresses. I get so many compliments each time I wear a new one out on the town or out of the country! I'm 5ft 4 and 138lbs and bought a medium. I definitely could have ordered a small! Theyre all quite beautiful and come with tons of compliments! New Favorite Dress I have never and I mean NEVER gotten more compliments on a dress! I wore it to a wedding it fit PERFECTLY, I didn’t have to pull the straps/top up at all the whole night, it was the perfect color, and length. Stretchy enough to dance in too!! BUY IT I have never had such good luck with an Amazon dress before! I order an XL as suggested but maybe could have gotten a Large. It has stretch and kind of feels like neoprene with its density in the shoulders but more soft and even stretchier in the skirt portion. I am 5’6 and usually wear a 12 in jeans and large in shirts. I’m a 38 DDD AND WAS VERY WORRIED about the girls not fitting or drooping. Well there’s a dad gum built in boobie sling in these!! I’m still going to tape so I can dance around, but this dress literally has everything. I’m going to slightly take it in myself at the waist but all my dresses need altered since my waist is 12 inches smaller than my hips and bust. SO. If you’re contemplating, just do it. It’s fabulous and I’m wearing this to a masquerade ball on new years eve. I’m pretty sure I’m going to stand out! ❤️

I have never left a product review before, let alone with a photo but wowwww this dress made me feel like a million bucks. It snatches where it needs to and smooths what it needs to. I was able to go for dinner and drinks without worrying about looking / feeling bloated in a tight dress. I was hesitant to buy this based on the price but will absolutely buy more styles and colors. Worth every penny 🤩 I do wish it provided more lift up top, but I just wore a bra. For reference I’m 5’5 ~185, and the large was perfect for me.

A surprise dream dress! I have NEVER left a product review in my life but felt it was my duty to society to leave a review on this dress. THIS DRESS IS A DREAM. I ordered it on a whim and didn’t try it on until the day before the wedding I decided to wear it to. I’m 5’8”, ~135lbs and a size 34C. At the wedding at least 20 strangers came up to me to tell me how much they loved the dress, 4 of which bought it on the spot! Since the wedding 3 of my friends have also ordered this dress! It’s comfortable, doesn’t fall, is true to size and wedding dancing approved! If you’re between sizes I would definitely size down because the back band is stretchy and accommodating! Everyone should own this dress and I will definitely be purchasing other colors!

Everything I was looking for! I have never received so many compliments! This dress was perfect for my son's wedding. The fabric is high quality and stunning. The color is a pure hunter green that leans toward blue. Not only that, but it is very comfortable and did not need to be ironed even traveling across the country in a carry-on suitcase. I am 5'8 and 140. The size 8 fit me without alterations. There is some "give" in the fabric, so if you wanted to wear something a little more form fitting, you might be able go down a size. It wasn't tight on me at all, and I feel like it enhanced my figure. I like that it wasn't low cut and that it didn't have a slit to the leg or down the back. I might shorten it so I can wear it for other festive occasions like Christmas parties.

Beautiful fit. Check measurements given. For me, size small 4-6 typically, Medium fits perfect. I have this Aphratti fitted short sleeved sheath dress in the black, size Medium and it fits me perfectly and looks beautiful on. Surprisingly flattering on. There are darts at the chest and waist that make it form fitting yet conservative . I typically wear a size small 4-6 top and bottom, weigh 125#, stand 5’2” and wear 36b bra. After checking the measurements I chose the size Medium. I didn’t want puckering at the chest and I wanted it to fit like it fits the model, and it does. The ends of the sleeves hit me at the elbow. The hem hits at the top of my shins and my knees are completely covered. There is a center back slit for walking. The fabric is solid, and has comfortable stretch to it. This plain black dress looks elegant on and is a good back drop for nice jewelry. I needed a black dress that isn’t sleeveless and this is lovely. A nice find.

Relaxed fit for a trendy business casual look I have to admit I was not completely confident I would love the way this two piece fit, when ordering, however always looking for great buys on business casual attire so figured it would be worth a shot. So excited I did because this set fits perfectly! For the record, I am 5’3 and roughly 135 pounds. Dress size is typically a 4, but I am in the late stages of postpartum, so still dealing with a bit of troublesome tummy area. Because of my self-consciousness about my stomach, many outfits just don’t seem to have a very flattering fit. Because of the high waist on these pants and the looseness in the leg, not only did it gather in to give me a more hourglass shape, but it flowed seamlessly from the waist down into the leg. The back of the pants has some elasticity, but not enough to where it pulls, puckles and looks tacky. It offers a rather discreet look, which I absolutely love as I’m not a fan of elastic waistbands. The pants just barely graze the floor barefoot, so with heels it’s a perfect length to showcase my shoes and for a more casual look with flats still a good length to where they don’t obnoxiously drag. The jacket has an interesting fit. The arms are fitted yet not too tight and the shoulders have light padding but not pronounced. The bodice doesn’t exactly conform to the body, so when buttoned, it looks like it should be tapered just a bit, however worn unbuttoned, gives more of a trendy casual look. The jacket is cropped and stops right at the waistline. It also helps to hide any excess body pudge that might come over the seam of the waist line slightly. I have a shorter torso so it sits a few inches below the waist, but is made to accommodate a wide range of torsos as I think it would be equally flattering on someone with a longer torso. In my case, the set flowed together very well and is unbeatable in price. I plan on ordering in every color available, I like it so much. Definitely recommend!!

Love this dress! I have to admit, the reason I love this dress is because it fits perfectly. I'm 5" 7.5" and 137 pounds. I bought a size 8 dress and it fits like a glove. The length is perfect with 2-3 inch heels. I can't say that it's a super high-quality dress. For example, there's no clasp at the top of the zipper. Then again, I didn't pay $300 for it. Surprisingly Attractive I have to be honest, I wasn't sure I could wear something like this. I still feel like I probably need shapewear under it, but I was shocked to find I actually like it. The VFSHOW Womens Formal Prom Sexy Strap Ruched U Neck Ruffle Evening Gown is a quality gown that fits like a glove. It is ideal for thin, tall women, but even on my slightly plump and short person it was okay. For reference, I am 5'4" (borderline petite), wear a size 10/12 usually, or size Medium US size, weigh 175-lbs give or take a few, have a 36C chest and size 32-34" waist. I got the size large. The length is slightly long on me, even with high heels, but wearable. I might hem it a bit higher to be sure I don't trip on it, though. The chest support is not great, so when I wear this out I want to have some additional support, but it definitely catches the eye. I like the ruffle with the adjustable leg slit which masks my lumpy thighs. I can only dream of those youthful, toned thighs of the model. The ruffle also helps disguise the mom-belly thing I have going on, making me willing to actually wear this in public. The dress fabric is heavy and thick compared to some dresses, but I think that is what you want in this. It has a lot of stretch and I might have even fit a medium but it would have been a bit snug. The zipper is smooth and hidden and the stitching excellent. I am very happy with the dress!

Tasteful yet sexy! I have to say that this dress far exceeded my expectations! My husband actually bought it for me and when it arrived I was so shocked that it was much nicer than I expected. The fabric is thick enough and has lots of stretch. It hugs in all the right places. The ruching is very nice and helps disguise any tummy pooch. I am an older lady but felt young and sexy in this dress. The neckline is a very deep V so I found a bra that was low enough to work. I’m 5’2”, 120 lbs, 34DD, and 30 inch waist. The small fits perfectly! Just buy it!

Lovely versatile dress, but inaccurate color I initially bought the burgundy version of this dress, because the photos showed a deep wine/burgundy color. But as you can see, it’s actually more of a true red with blue undertones. In some light, it does look darker but it’s not what I wanted. I then ordered the red, and I’m really happy with it! It’s a warmer red with orange undertones and I think it looks better on my olive skin. The dress itself is very flattering on my body (5’9, 170 lbs, ordered size L, 35” waist but can fit into 31”-36” clothes). The back of the dress is smocked and is overall stretchy and comfortable. The fabric doesn’t feel cheap to me; it’s lightweight and has a nice drape to it. It can definitely be dressed up with nice shoes and jewelry or dresses down with sneakers and a jacket. I’m wearing it to the Jonas Brothers concert and taking it on vacation to Portugal. Oh and it’s much easier to get the straps right when someone else ties them for you, otherwise it’s impossible to get them tight enough/even on both sides.

Fabric is a bit sheer so I wouldn’t get in light colors but I love this purple! I am going to buy in other colors.

BUY THE DRESS! I initially purchased this dress in a medium but ended up also purchasing it in a small and kept both. If you’re in between sizes, size up 1 size. I like really detailed product reviews because I’m finding that I’m usually in between sizes. In this specific case it was best for me to size up a one size. I’m 5’8, 150 lbs 36C bust and usually wear a size 6 in dresses. I have a swimmer build (broad shoulders, narrow hips). The small was snug in the rib cage area as well as the shoulders. It also was shorter than I like for a flowy maxi dress. The medium is a better fit for me, but could be taken in maybe a 1/4’ to a 1/2’ in the empire roushing. I’m not going through that trouble because it’s more comfortable when it’s a tad bit looser. Just giving an idea of my experience. The fabric is super soft and really comfortable. I did have to pin/sew the neckline because it is really low on me and I prefer a more conservative look. Pockets are great. Can be dressed up or down. I do think it needs some additional accessories because it vaguely reminds me of a choir dress by itself. Still cute and comfy which is the goal.

NO Stretch, semi-formal- medium grade I like the styling and feel good about wearing this dress. However, there is close to zero stretch in the fabric. Even though the listing says 10% spandex and stretchy, it is not. Tag in dress says in big letters 100% Polyester. I could barely get it zipped. It is very tight on me at the under bust area and yet at the same time large in the bust. I’m a 40C and did not fill out the cups completely. I had to pin the top closed to prevent large gaps between me and the bra portion. The dress is only lined on the top from the bottom of the bust to the top of the straps. I think I will try making some alterations to shorten the straps about two inches and hope the bust will then fit me better. As is usually for my height (6’) the dress is about 3 inches too short. It comes to my ankles instead of the top of my feet.Construction is well done; all thread tails are neatly trimmed and the seams are tight and straight. The fabric is medium weight.Overall, elegant looking dress with some fit issues and without much structure. Not expensive looking but doesn’t look like dime store quality either. Would be passable for attending a wedding particularly for a younger person when expectations of sophisticated formal wear are less. I wouldn't attend the Oscars in this.For reference I am 40/36/39, 6’ tall and 187 pounds

Nice semi dressy summer dress I like this dress more than I thought I would. I chose black as it seemed more versatile to me than the lighter colors. With dresses, I usually end up buying a size 20 for the bottom, and the top part ends up too big, but this fits perfectly. I'd say this 2X fits like a plus size 18. The layered parts fall in such a way that they don't overemphasize any particular areas, which can be an issue for some of us. I'm about 5'5" and the length is good with and without slight heels. Va Va voom!! I love everything about this dress! It is absolutely gorgeous! I am 5’3, 135 lbs and I am wearing a size small. The glittery black material has a very nice stretch to it and is very comfortable to wear. The ruching around the waist is very flattering for a woman’s figure but I would definitely recommend wearing some shapewear underneath or underwear that has no seams. The feathers give this dress and expensive and glamorous feel but on a budget. It has a zip closure under your right armpit and is very easy to put on. You cannot wear the sleeves up on your shoulder because they would be way too tight, they have to sit off shoulder. Another feature that I love is the adjustable slit. You can choose to zip it down for a more modest look or all the way up for a sexier look. It was the perfect length with a pair of 4 inch heels for my 5’3 frame. I would definitely recommend this dress.

Perfect for busty girls! I LOVE IT! It's absolutely adorable and so flattering. I wear my 50s dresses with a quality petticoat to get the big flair in the skirt. This fabric is actually a good quality thickness though. So for those who don't wear petticoats, it could still look great.I usually have a problem with these dresses not being made for larger busts. I'm a 42DDD and this looks so great on me! The secret is the stretchy back! Beneath the lace-up back is very stretchy so it would give a flattering fit on a wide range of bust sizes. I'm wearing a strapless bra in the picture. I was afraid the back might be too low to hide it, but that's not a problem at all.The side zipper is, of course, clutch! No help needed to get in an out.I'm impressed with the fabric thickness. These are usually a very cheap fabric. This one is durable and absolutely no transparency. The top is even lined.I usually wear a 2x in normal women's cloths (or an XL in unisex shirts). I sized up to a 3X because that's always a good idea in these types of dresses. And it's a perfect fit. So I say size up one size for sure.I'm bookmarking this dress to order other patterns later! For now, though, I can't wait to wear this to Halloween brunch!100% recommend!UPDATE: My sister in law loves it so much, she ordered one for herself. Twinsies!UPDATE 2: Added some more pictures! Got to wear this out once already and got SO MANY compliments on it! Ordering it in red for Christmas! My friend who I had brunch with loved it so much she's ordering one too! We're going to convert them to straps though. Should be a simple sewing job. You also have the long belt as extra material if you need it. I'm going to make a matching headband for the Halloween one with the belt material.UPDATE 3: As promised, I bought it in red for Christmas. We just sewed the straps down in the back. I wore a bolero over it so we didn't pay much attention to making them look perfect. It was an easy job. again, I received a million compliments.I'm wearing it with the Malco Modes "Zooey" Chiffon Petticoat. "Zooey" is the fluff size I'm wearing. I tried a "Jennifer" but sent it back because it was too much puff. Invest in a good petticoat and you can buy all of these 50's dresses for cheap and they look amazing. The chiffon is also smooth and silky and not at all hot. And when the lace edge shows through, it's cute -- not obscene.Next wedding I get invited to, I'll be ordering one of the prints!

Classy lines, modern stretch. I love it! This is the small, and the fit is great. I was a little nervous - I bought based on my usual measurements (35-26-36) and then actually took some new measurements and realized I'd added an inch or more everywhere during quarantine. Oops! I was hoping the stretch would offer a little forgiveness, and it does. Until I drop the extra inch I might go with something like Spanx to keep the lines smooth, but it's not so tight I'd be uncomfortable wearing it as-is.The fabric is nice and thick and has a decent amount of stretch. If you don't like pulling things down if they start to shimmy, you might size up a bit. It does come out of the bag a little rumpled from shipping, but that's nothing a quick once-over with a steamer won't fix.This cut is very flattering, and I'm impressed with the quality for the price. I have fairly muscular arms, so the sleeves are snug but not uncomfortably so. The length at my 5'5" hits me at a very lady-like just below the knee. The collar was standing up awkwardly out of the package, but it fell into place after hitting it with the steamer.I think this is a very classy style - can't wait to wear it out and about! I'll definitely be buying more from this brand.

LOVELY, BUT NOT MY STYLE I love Koh Koh dresses and skirts. I had high hopes for this dress. I'm looking for a maxi dress for a non-formal night on a cruise. (The one picture that I have posted shows two Koh Koh skirts. They are so nice and they make me look trim). I am 5'6 and weigh about 158 lb. So to find an outfit that doesn't make me look frumpy is difficult. The fabric on the dress is amazing. The color looks like a beautiful Plum color. The dress was quite long so I would have to cut it off and re-hem it shorter. Not a problem because it would been straight sewing. The part that I had problems with is the upper part. I just could not get it to lay right on my chest, on the back, and even on my arms. It always looked messy. The fabric, the quality, and even the workmanship are quite excellent. This dress is a pull-on dress. No zippers or attachments of any kind. However, if you are tall enough and thin enough this is an excellent choice for you, and I recommend giving it serious consideration. 🌷

Great Fit and Length, But the Dots? I love long dresses, and this one certainly fits the bill. The design makes it perfect for twirling, which I enjoy. The material is thin, but the dress has some weight to it, likely due to the elastic panel that forms the top part of the dress. There’s no iffy chemical smell. I ordered one size up because I didn’t want the dress to be too fitted. This size fits me perfectly, but I think a smaller size would have worked just as well, thanks to the elastic top that accommodates various chest sizes. This is a pullover dress without a zipper. It’s unlined and features two side pockets. I really love the length—it’s on the longer side, falling about two inches above my ankles. The sleeves are also longer, which is great for me since I have long arms; they reach past my wrists. It’s very comfortable and twirl-friendly. The only thing I’m unsure about is the dots on the fabric. For some reason, they make the dress feel a bit less elegant to me. For reference, I am 5’7” and 128 lbs. I’m planning to wear it next week for a short trip. I think this dress works well for early fall.

The material is thin, but the dress has some weight to it, likely due to the elastic panel that forms the top part of the dress. There’s no iffy chemical smell. I ordered one size up because I didn’t want the dress to be too fitted. This size fits me perfectly, but I think a smaller size would have worked just as well, thanks to the elastic top that accommodates various chest sizes. This is a pullover dress without a zipper. It’s unlined and features two side pockets. I really love the length—it’s on the longer side, falling about two inches above my ankles. The sleeves are also longer, which is great for me since I have long arms; they reach past my wrists. It’s very comfortable and twirl-friendly. The only thing I’m unsure about is the dots on the fabric. For some reason, they make the dress feel a bit less elegant to me. For reference, I am 5’7” and 128 lbs. I’m planning to wear it next week for a short trip. I think this dress works well for early fall.

Unusual but eye-catching style I love the asymmetrical cut of the top of this dress. The top is lined and hangs nicely once the dress is steamed out—which, by the way, was easy after I hung it dry pretty wet. The skirt is not lined but also hangs well and is a nice length for a cocktail reception. The fabric is lovely; the beige is champagne—pinkish not yellowish The dress construction is just OK, but acceptable for a dress at this price point. I did not find the neck tight as some reviewers did, but I agree that the dress would support more bra choices if the right arm hole wasn’t cut so deep. I’m small chested, so am wearing just silicone pasties in these photos. I have a strapless that sits low that works too, although it may peek out when I’m dancing. If you add a hook & eye at the base of the neck below the buttons, you could also wear a halter style bra that wraps at the base of the neck. For reference, I’m just under 5’8” and 118 lbs.

Great elasticity, enticing and attractive dress, confidence booster I love the color of this dress; it is a vivid and fully saturated hot pink. It matches the color of the model picture perfectly. My photos don’t match the color as well as the listing photos, I don’t think cell phone is able to capture the color well nor is my lighting the correct daylight color balance. I got the XL size and it fits me awesomely, even the sleeves are long enough for my long arms and long torso. For reference I am 40/36/39, 6’ tall and 187 pounds. Length is fine, hitting me mid-thigh. The ruching does wonders for covering my body defects. The waist and chest are a good fit. I don’t care for the way the square neck hits the sleeves. It is an uncomfortable fit for me as the arms tend to want to slide off my shoulders and it reveals more chest than I like. I find myself constantly adjusting the arms. I love that the dress is fully lined except for the arms which gives the mesh a kind of florescent glow. The lining makes the body opaque, even black undergarments don’t show through. There is a zipper in the back that I haven’t needed and can’t imagine why anyone would. The opening for your head is identical to the opening at the bottom of the dress plus the fabric is super stretchy. I can easily pull in over my head or step into it and pull it up over my waist without using the zipper.Construction wise the dress is manufactured okay. There are a few loose thread tails and the fabric is light weight. This is a night club type dress and not highly sophisticated but it sure does have sex appeal. It is comfortable to wear and my favorite color. I feel good wearing this dress that teases the imagination. It is flirty, enticing and attractive and wearing it boosts my confidence so that I feel the same way.

It’s has a little stretch making it comfortable to wear. If you have a large chest, the top may not work since there isn’t a ton of stretch. For reference, I’m a 38B. This is not tall girl or curvy girl friendly. If you’re hippy, the crotch area will do that annoying thing where is bunched up that all of us who have hips understand. The model must be very short for the bottoms to hit the floor. The legs aren’t very long. I’m barely 5’6 but I have long legs and the bottoms barely graze my ankles. I wish designers would add length to pants so that they flatter multiple heights and body types. Other than the length (or lack thereof), I like this and it’s a nice casual errand day or light brunch outfit.

Gorgeous and Comfy I love the way this dress fits so much that I’ve bought 3 colors. It’s very flattering, comfortable, and perfect for a formal dress. The dress stays up well and the fabrics feels nice. I am a bit of a perfectionist and went a little crazy with the ironing, but it was so worth it. If you don’t want to iron it, it will have some wrinkles but still looks beautiful. I was able to use a cheap handheld steamer to get the biggest wrinkles out but an iron worked best. I want a short dress in this style and more fabric options because I just love the cut and fit of it. I think it would also work well for bigger chests because I definitely had some room with a C/D cup. It stayed up and looked great both with a push up bra and braless even with me sizing up for a looser fit. I like that the arms are comfy and don’t dig in like some off the shoulder styles can. The colors look just like the picture and I got the light blue, light green, and black. I wore the light colors to weddings and was drinking and dancing a lot at both with no issues. I haven’t had the opportunity to wear the black one yet but I have a feeling it might be my favorite 😁

Perfect fit, except for length, love it anyway I love this dress! Because of the two way stretch of this fabric, it is very comfortable to wear and accommodates a variety of body types. I wanted a dress with sleeves and wasn't too snug or too loose--this dress fits the way I wanted. I ordered an XL, since I'm borderline US size L/XL. I think I could have fit the L, but the sleeves might have been too tight. I'm 5'4" and knee the length would be too long, so I was expecting that and knew I'd need to hem it. I am an experienced seamstress, so I figured I could hem it to my preferred length. When I buy an already made article of clothing, I don't like to have to alter it, but this dress is worth it. I deducted one star because it is not available in a wearable length (unless you are really tall). After trying it on, I had my daughter pin the back of the dress at the heel where I wanted the finished hem to be. Then I added about an inch for the hem allowance. I cut off about 3 3/8" (about 8.5 cm). I haven't had time to buy the right color thread and sew the hem yet, but I have worn it since I cut it, since the fabric doesn't fray. I am planning to contact the seller to see if I can order future dresses from them with a custom length (I love the dress enough to want it in other colors).
