MY ABSOLUTE FAVORITE DRESS HANDS DOWN!! I LOVE THIS DRESS! I gained a bit of weight during quarantine and none of my nice dresses fit me anymore. After plans changed due to Covid, I had less than a week to find a dress for a small wedding we were attending. With no stores having dressing rooms open, and it being too short notice to order from my usual dress sites, I turned to amazon and crossed my fingers! And dang did amazon deliver! (pun intended 😂) I ordered a size large after reading many reviews and I’m really glad I did. Many people had commented that the middle section was a bit loose and I found this to be true as well. I have larger hips and a decently round booty so there was a bit of extra fabric around my lower back that I didn’t love. Luckily I know how to sew and just added two darts to that area to take it in a bit and then it was like absolute magic! The chest area fit perfectly for me, but that being said, I have a rather small chest unlike most people who tend to wear a size large. I can see how any one with a larger bust might feel a bit snug. The length of the dress was perfect for me which is usually another concern of mine. I am rather tall with a long torso (5’9), but the lace hit right at the top of the knee and the underskirt a few inches above that. I got SOOOOOO many compliments on this dress and everyone was so shocked that I had gotten it for so cheap off of amazon just two days prior! Also the color was amazing! My boyfriend was obsessed with it and decided he needs to take me to a nice dinner soon so I can wear it again 😂 If your debating getting this dress, just do it! Read other people’s reviews that are similar in size to you rather than relying only on the size chart and you won’t be disappointed!

Plus size girls this is our dress! I love this dress! It fits well and I just cannot wait to wear it. I do NOT have a butt, but this dress helped out with the second layer of flowy fabric. This dress is made for plus-size girls! Overall, my brother rated this dress a 9.5 out of 10! Dress XL Chest: 40C Waist: 46inches Height: 5'5in Shoes: Shein

Wonderful dress I love this dress! It looks and fits beautifully! It's my second dress from this seller and I must say that, although I am not a big fan of the fabrics, the designs are fabulous and the fit is always spot on. As I zipped this particular dress, it really felt like it was tailored just for me. It's absolutely perfect fit-wise and I am sure that the thin, but double layer fabric, and the elastic in the back will give many ladies this same feeling. For reference, I am 5'5, 130 lbs and got an S. In terms of the fabric, it does feel like polyester and not even the type that tries to imitate a cotton blend. However, it is very soft and it has zero static issues, which surprised me and it's definitely a plus. In fact, I believe that it's because of this fabric that the dress falls/flows so beautifully. I chose the white with blue flowers pattern because it makes the dress look a bit more casual and I'll get to wear it more often. Happy with my choice, as I'm really excited to wear this dress as soon as it gets warm! :) I definitely recommend it; I think the price is excellent for a dress that is as beautiful and flattering as this.

Size down, I typically order Xl-Xxl and only needed a large in this dress. The dress is good quality and not see through. I love wearing black, and especially with the drama of having sequins attached, and this dress is no disappointment. In the process of looking for an evening gown to wear on a cruise for the second formal night, I thought I would give this one a try. I usually wear a size 10 in a gown. I bought this in a 10 and it fits perfectly. I am delighted with the fabric, a middleweight jersey type that does not have a sheen to it. There is no lining. It does have a thin built-in bra. The fabric is not see-through. The dress has a look of quality, and it is comfortable and easy to wear. It is super attractive, very flattering, and fits very well through the shoulders and the bust line, and is definitely well made. The skirt is A-line in shape, so the slit can be sewed shut, shortened, or left as is. It's a personal preference. The marketing photos show the dress coming down to well above her ankles. I am 5'6" and it comes all the way to the floor, and will need to be shortened a bit, even with my 2.5" heels on. Easy deal. I would classify this dress as simple elegance, and dynamic. Very beautiful. Very stunning. It is a privilege to be able to wear it.😃👍💕

The belt can be looped on the front or all around. The zipper only goes down to middle of your back so it’s easy to do & undo yourself. I’m 5’2 so a taller girl might want to wear spanx or shorts underneath as the sides of the dress sort of comes up higher. The green is like an ever green emerald color. Super flattering with tan skin/dark hair or even blonde hair. I ordered the cinnamon colored one first, same fit and size. But color is like a super deep rust orange color and wasn’t as flattering on me. 100% recommend. Super easy & quick to deal with on returns & quick shipping.

Great dress. Great fit. Great price. I loved this dress. I wore it for a friends wedding. It was something different than your typical dress. It has a very feminine pattern that was flattering for my pale skin (which is not an easy find!) I liked the cut and thought that it was a great way to accentuate my neckline/collarbone. The fabric was very comfortable and breathable. I wore a nude strapless bra which worked really well. It was nice that I could wear a normal strapless bra without having to wear any weird tape or specialty bra to avoid having it show etc. The dress was also a great length for me as well. (I am a little over 5’4) I weigh approx 110 pounds so I purchased a small. If there was an extra small it probably have been even more flattering because the waistline was a little big for me but it still totally worked. I wore a wedge shoe but don’t have them on in the pictures because I was running around decorating before the wedding and cleaning up after the wedding. A wedge shoe worked really well during the wedding though! I would highly recommend this dress and I definitely did when several people at the wedding wanted to know where I found it! They were all shocked when I said Amazon! :) Definitely order this dress! You save on gas money driving around all over town looking for a dress and you will also save on the cost of a great dress that’s perfect for any occasion!

Pay attention to sizing chart!! I measured myself and went by their size chart, I normally wear a 2x but by their sizing chart I needed the 3x. It was comfortable, flowy, I felt amazing in the dress 👗 over all I give it 4 stars, if the sizing was accurate id give it a 4.5

Cute but definitely thin I might not have checked the sizing chart as close as I could have - it fits everywhere pretty well, but a little snug in the stomach. Fabulous dress I must confess, I do not have a special event coming up that would require such a glamorous dress. But, given the wonderful design, beautiful dusty pink color, and the really low price for a gown of this kind, I just couldn't help myself from ordering. According to the seller's size chart, I am between an S and an M, leaning more towards the latter. However, the dusty pink was only available in S and the other colors just didn't have the same appeal to me, so I went for it. Happy to the top part of the dress fits like a glove and you need no bra with this. It has a padded, supportive built-in one. As for the skirt part, it fits well, but the slit is so high it exposes my entire leg, all the way to the lower hip. I have it pinned in the photos to where I'd like it to be. Maybe an M would not posed this issue, being a bit longer and wider. So I will need to sew a few inches of the dress to make it look a bit more modest. No biggie though. In terms of length, I am 5'5 and it hits the floor without shoes, so it will be perfect with heels. Totally recommend it. It's definitely a steal!

I forgot to put on the black sash/ribbon that comes with it, but it looks great with or without it. The material of the dress is a bit stiff, but for the price, it's still a very nice dress and could be worn to a formal occasion or just a nice, fun event. The dress definitely needs to be ironed before wearing, and would probably do better with a garment steamer (which I will try next time). The inside label says dry clean only which I might consider to prevent any damage in the washer/dryer (also to preserve the color). My only disappointment was that the skirt does not have the soft pleats that the product photo shows. Perhaps if you know how to iron/steam them to do it, it could, but with my ironing skills, the best I could do was to just lay it flat and iron out the shipping wrinkles. Tip: Buy a petticoat to wear with this. I am wearing one in the photo and it really make a difference in the style and fullness of the skirt part of the dress. You can get one for $14 or $15.

AMAZING DRESS I never write reviews but I have to sing the praises of this dress! First of all, very well made - it is a velvety material with so many sequins, fully lined, and with boning. I was shocked at the quality when I pulled it out - better than the many shops she tried prom dresses on at. My well-endowed daughter didn’t even need to wear a bra, the fit was immaculate - zero alterations needed. But y’all, the classiness, elegance, and insane sparkle of this dress made it THE showstopper at our junior/senior prom. It is impossible to convey the sparkle. We did put an underskirt to keep the beautiful a-line shape but it could certainly be worn without it as well - just personal preference. You will not regret this purchase. We are keeping our eyes open for dresses in the future from this seller. Do make sure you order with time to spare - ours arrived in great time but I know customs can cause delays sometimes. For reference, my daughter is 5’4”, 200lbs, wore 2” heels, and typically a D cup bra.

Extremely flattering on curvy figures! I never, ever choose sheath style dresses because I don’t like the way they hug and emphasize my butt. I always choose styles with a defined waistline and a full skirt. But I decided to order it solely because it looked so lovely on the lady who posted the video, who’s figure is similar to mine. So THANK YOU to her. This was meant to be a “backup” dress, but to my surprise, it looked so good that it is THE dress that I will wear for my son’s wedding. It’s also very comfortable since the under layer has some stretch to it. And best of all, it covers my flappy old lady arms without looking matronly. For reference, I am 5’4”, and weigh about 180 pounds. I am wearing 2.5 inch heels with the dress. 12p fit perfectly and I will not need to have it shortened. I ALWAYS have to have long dresses/skirts altered so that was an added bonus. The length is good even in bare feet. If you’re on the fence about ordering it…just do it. Even if you have curves.

I normally stay away from bodycon dresses, especially with the mermaid bottom. However, I’ve found that Grace Karin dresses have a decent fit for my body type. This dress is no exception. For reference, I am 5 feet and 5 inches tall and weigh 130 pounds and normally wear medium-sized clothes, and this dress in medium fits me right. The dress is made out of a medium thickness velvet fabric that is a bit stretchy and wrinkles but not too much. I also like the design of the dress. The cowl neckline provides a nice draping across the bust. There are also a few horizontal pleats on the right side that provide draping that helps hide an abdominal bulge if needed. The length of the dress is perfect for me, and the mermaid bottom adds some elegance to the dress. Overall, I am pleased with this dress. It is beautiful and elegant.

PERFECT PROM DRESS!! 🤍🤍 I normally wear a size 22 and according to my measurements I would fit in a 22 but due to the material and shipping times I sized up to a 24 fii or safety and it fit perfectly. The material isn’t itchy at all under my arms. I love the corset style so much, it makes me look snatched 😚 for reference I am about 5’6 and weigh 240 carrying most of my weight in my midsection and thighs.It is quite long with about 6 or so inches of the dress dragging on the ground as pictured so I will probably get it hemmed because I don’t plan on wearing shoes tall enough to lift it and I don’t want to be stepping on it all night. It does have a slit in it which I forgot about and didn’t even notice at first because of all the tulle so I’m gonna probably pin it back somehow just to make the slit more apparent. I took a chance on this dress when I bought it because it had no reviews or ratings and was being shipped from China so like most I was skeptical. The one thing I would say is that because of the material the chest area doesn’t have much give so I’m not sure how this would fit on someone with a bigger chest since I’m an a cup 😭 but other than that I’m so very happy with this dress and can’t wait to wear it to prom. I highly recommend it!! *ps the glitter in one of the tulle layers does shake out but I don’t mind it at all and it’s not that much honestly

Really comfortable and pretty I normally wear an 18 in dresses, and that is the size that fit me. Amazon recommended a 22, which was way too big. Gorgeous dress! I normally wear XS in most clothing but looking at the size chart my dimensions matched those of the S, so I thought I'd give this stunning dress a try. I'm so glad I did! It fits beautifully (and is sexy, according to my biased husband). The material, while polyester, doesn't look like cheap polyester and has a nice texture to it. The dress is very comfortable, too. I was worried the neckline would look tacky but it doesn't and is like having a built-in necklace (which is nice since an actual necklace doesn't work with this neckline). I'm 5'2" and while wearing 2-3" heels this dress does touch the ground, especially in the back. However, because of the slit, I can still walk forward and the length totally works and adds to the elegance of the dress (I'll just plan to never walk backwards while wearing it). Overall, this is a gorgeous dress that fits like a glove and hides imperfections. I couldn't be happier with it – it's perfect for formal occasions!

Nicely Made Dress, but large bust area. I only have two issues with this gorgeous dress. The first is more of a personal preference though. The Green color is not as soft or teal as pictured -this dress is GREEN. Not my best color. Second, the bust area seems big. Or rather, it just sticks out at the sides. I’m 5’7”, 115lbs, 34C, 27”Waist, 35”Hips, and got a Small. I can’t imagine how this would fit on a smaller bust size. You won’t need tape though, as it covers everything well. The fabric is really nice and heavier than I expected. But, it does show through -like my navel and butt/hip lumps. In front the neck is pretty constricting too. Other than my little nitpicks, I think this is a fabulous and flattering dress. I just can’t wear it -without altering- because of the way the top sticks out. I also would have chosen a different color. But, that’s just me.

Perfect for pear shaped with fat upper arms! I ordered 15 dresses to try on to be a guest at an outdoor summer wedding. I’m 60 and most of the dresses were way too short! great for the price/versatile I ordered 5 of these for bridesmaid dresses. They were a great matierial and perfect for my wedding. My only issue is that they weren't all the same color. And I didn't know this until the morning of the wedding because when I ordered I sent them to each person so they could try them on. Luckily there were 3 one color and 2 different so I was able to alternate each girl making it look intentional. If you're taller than 5'9" don't expect it to cover your ankles. I had girls from size 6 to size 20 and the dress looked nice on everyone. I liked these because they can be worn during the summer and not just a one time wear.

Beautiful dress right out of the bag! I ordered 7outfits for my mom to try on for her grandson's wedding. This was the second outfit she tried. It was perfect right out of the bag! Excellent quality, comfort, color and price. She looked beautiful, and most importantly, she felt beautiful in this dress! She's 80 years old, and she rocked this gorgeous dress!

Surprisingly flattering fit I ordered 8 dresses to try on for a very formal event this week. This was one I tossed in the order as a "why not" wild card option. Of course it was the best fitting & most flattering of all the dresses! I am short & curvy (5'1" w/ 34DD 130lbs) it accentuated all my good areas & provided coverage for less flattering areas (mommy pooch.) Ultimately it wasn't dressy enough for this event but I'll probably keep it to wear for a Christmas party or similar event. The straps feel a little cheap (bra like) but that's just being nit-picking.

LOVE this dress I ordered a 18 plus in black, I’m 5’5 for height reference. I had two back to back pregnancies and put on over 100 Ibs, I’ve found it hard to feel attractive in anything, but this dress has made me feel like a goddess. 🖤 I bought it for Halloween costume, but would love to find another reason to wear it. Just some info though, I am not as top heavy as your typical full figured woman, so the chest was slightly loose, I can easily sew the chest together to tighten, but if you have larger girls, this dress would be great. It also laces all the way up the back, so it easily creates the perfect waistline without being too tight. The quality is also very nice. 5 stars from me.

I did return the dress but the only reason was because I was given a couple vey high end dresses that were much better made and also beautiful. So pretty!! I ordered a bunch of dresses from amazon for my graduation. I love the rusched look of this dress. It’s extremely flattering and makes the booty look good!! I’m 5’ 7” and 135 pounds. I fall between a small and medium for most dresses. I ended up going with the medium in this dress. It fit everywhere except the top part. I guess I didn’t have the bust (I’m a 34 B) to completely fill out the dress, and the sleeves of the dress kept falling off my shoulders. It was super annoying. If I had gone with the small, I think it would have fit perfect! I ultimately decided to go with a different dress for my graduation, so I ended up returning this one

I am 5’5, 40DD, 180 lbs

Wedding Vow Re-Newal, good for curvy women I ordered a LARGE, my height is 4'11 and my weight is 150lbs.
